1956 年夏天，约翰·麦卡锡在达特茅斯学院组织了一场暑期研讨会，邀请了当时最顶: In the summer of 1956, John McCarthy organized a summer symposium at Dartmouth College that invited the leading computer scientists, mathematicians, and psychologists of the day. 1960 年代后期，AI 研究面临翻译不准确、感知机能力有限、组合爆炸等问题。1: In the late 1960s, AI research faced problems such as inaccurate translation, limited capabilities of perceptrons, and combinatorial explosion. 大模型的知识停留在训练截止日期。RAG 的做法是：用户提问 → 先从知识库检索相: The knowledge of large models is stuck at the training deadline. RAG's approach is: users ask questions → first retrieve relevant content from the knowledge base → give the retrieved information and questions to the model → the model answers based on these information. In this way, even if the model has not been trained with certain knowledge, it can still give accurate answers.
大模型刚训练完时，虽然能说很多话，但回答方式可能不符合人类期望——比如太啰嗦、太: When a large model is first trained, although it can say a lot, the way it answers may not meet human expectations—for example, it may be too wordy, too robotic, or offensive. What RLHF does is: let human annotators score different answers, then train a "reward model" to simulate human preferences, and finally use reinforcement learning to let the large model learn to generate answers that are more popular with humans.

GPT-3 展示的少样本能力，让通用模型开始取代大量单任务模型。: The few-sample capabilities demonstrated by GPT-3 allow general models to begin to replace a large number of single-task models.
GPT-3 证明了 Scaling Law——更大的模型、更多的数据、更多的算力: GPT-3 proves the Scaling Law - larger models, more data, and more computing power can bring unexpected emergent capabilities. It kicked off the big model arms race.
GPT-4 时代的多模态体验往往由多个模型串联完成，语音交互需要分别经过转写、语: The multi-modal experience in the GPT-4 era is often completed by multiple models in series. Voice interaction requires transcription, language model and speech synthesis respectively, and the delay and information loss are obvious.
GPT-4 系列与 o1 系列分别承担通用对话和深度推理，用户和开发者需要在不同: The GPT-4 series and o1 series are responsible for general dialogue and deep reasoning respectively. Users and developers need to manually choose between different models, speed and cost.
GPT-4 在逻辑推理、编程、写作、考试等方面的能力远超前代模型。它能理解图像内: GPT-4's capabilities in logical reasoning, programming, writing, exams, etc. far exceed those of previous generations of models. It understands image content and conducts conversations based on images. Score in the top 10% on standardized tests such as the U.S. Bar Exam, Medical Licensing Examination, and more.
GPT-4 证明了多模态大模型的可行性，并将 AI 的推理能力推到了新高度。它也: GPT-4 proves the feasibility of multi-modal large models and pushes AI's reasoning capabilities to new heights. It also opens the door for subsequent AI Agent and multi-modal applications.
GPT-4o 的“o”代表 omni。模型原生接收并生成文本、音频和图像信息，语: The "o" in GPT-4o stands for omni. The model natively receives and generates text, audio and image information, with speech response speed close to human conversation and significantly reducing multi-modal reasoning costs.
GPT-5 家族统一快速与推理模式，并强化代码、工具调用和专业任务。产品路由开始: The GPT-5 family unifies fast and inference modes and enhances code, tool calls, and specialized tasks. Product routing begins to automatically decide whether to invest more inference calculations based on the difficulty of the problem.
GPT-5.4 与 5.5 已把百万上下文、计算机操作、托管 Shell、Ski: GPT-5.4 and 5.5 have incorporated millions of contexts, computer operations, managed shells, skills, and MCP into model workflows, but complex tasks still require more efficient tool orchestration and cross-round inference reuse.
GPT-5.6 允许模型在托管运行时中编写 JavaScript 调用合资格工具: GPT-5.6 can write JavaScript in a hosted runtime to call eligible tools. It also adds multi-agent orchestration in beta, explicit prompt caching, persisted reasoning, max reasoning effort, and Pro mode. Sol, Terra, and Luna target capability, cost balance, and throughput respectively.
IBM 的超级计算机 \"深蓝\" 在六局比赛中击败了国际象棋世界冠军卡斯帕罗夫: IBM's supercomputer "Deep Blue" defeated world chess champion Garry Kasparov in six games, becoming an iconic milestone in the history of AI development.
ImageNet 和 ILSVRC 为深度学习在图像识别领域的爆发提供了\"弹药: ImageNet and ILSVRC provided "ammunition" for the explosion of deep learning in the field of image recognition. Without ImageNet, AlexNet would have no stage for training and validation.
Llama 3 已形成庞大的开放模型生态，但多模态、长上下文与高效扩展仍是闭源旗: Llama 3 has formed a huge open model ecosystem, but multi-modality, long context and efficient expansion are still the main advantages of the closed-source flagship.
Llama 4 使用混合专家架构，只激活部分参数完成推理。Scout 强调超长上: Llama 4 uses a hybrid expert architecture that only activates some parameters to complete reasoning. Scout emphasizes long context, Maverick emphasizes comprehensive capabilities; both handle text and images natively.
Llama 把高能力开放权重模型带到研究者、开发者与本地部署场景，并推动开放模型: Llama brings high-capability open weight models to researchers, developers and local deployment scenarios, and promotes the open model to become an independent ecosystem.
Llama 打破了 OpenAI 和 Google 对大语言模型的垄断，让全球开: Llama breaks OpenAI and Google's monopoly on large language models, allowing developers around the world to locally deploy and customize powerful language models. It has given rise to a prosperous ecosystem of open source models such as Mistral, Qwen, and DeepSeek.
LLM 不是\"有意识\"的，它只是在预测最可能的下一个词。: LLM is not "conscious", it is just predicting the most likely next word.
LLM 没有真正的理解，它的知识来自训练数据的统计模式。: LLM has no real understanding, its knowledge comes from the statistical patterns of the training data.
LLM 是 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 等所有现代 AI 聊天产: LLM is the underlying foundation of all modern AI chat products such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc. Understanding LLM is the starting point for understanding the entire modern AI industry.
MCP 把 Agent 生态的重点从单个工具调用推进到可共享、可组合的连接协议。: MCP advances the focus of the Agent ecosystem from a single tool call to a shareable and composable connection protocol.
MCP 定义了一套标准协议，让 AI 模型可以统一地连接各种工具、数据库、文件系: MCP defines a set of standard protocols that allow AI models to uniformly connect to various tools, databases, file systems, and APIs. Developers can implement the MCP server so that different AI applications can access the same tools and data sources.
MCP 解决了 AI Agent 生态的核心问题——碎片化。在此之前，每个 AI: MCP solves the core problem of the AI ​​Agent ecosystem - fragmentation. Previously, each AI application and integration between each tool was custom-made. MCP provides a set of standards that allow tools and AI applications to be plug-and-play.
Meta 发布 Llama 4 Scout 与 Maverick，采用混合专家架: Meta released the open-weight Llama 4 Scout and Maverick mixture-of-experts models with native text-and-image input. Scout advertised a 10-million-token context window, while Maverick activated 17 billion of its 400 billion total parameters per token.
Meta 发布了 Llama 系列大语言模型，虽然最初以研究为目的非公开泄露，但: Meta released the Llama series of large language models. Although it was initially leaked privately for research purposes, it quickly spawned a global open source large model ecosystem and changed the power structure of the AI ​​industry.
Meta 发布了多个尺寸的 Llama 模型，虽然最初未完全开源，但权重泄露后，: Meta released Llama models in multiple sizes. Although it was not fully open source initially, after the weights were leaked, the community quickly derived fine-tuned versions such as Alpaca and Vicuna. Subsequently, Meta officially opened Llama 2, Llama 3, Llama 3.1 and other versions, gradually establishing the benchmark status of open source large models.
Meta 开源大模型打破闭源垄断: Meta open source large model breaks closed source monopoly
MoE 是扩大模型容量同时控制训练和推理成本的重要路线。: MoE is an important route to expand model capacity while controlling training and inference costs.
NLP 任务需要为每个任务单独设计和训练模型。: NLP tasks require individually designing and training models for each task.
NLP 依赖 RNN/LSTM 进行序列建模，训练慢、难并行化、长序列效果差。: NLP relies on RNN/LSTM for sequence modeling, which is slow to train, difficult to parallelize, and has poor effect on long sequences.
NLP 主要依赖词袋模型和 one-hot 编码，无法捕捉语义关系。: NLP mainly relies on bag-of-words models and one-hot encoding, which cannot capture semantic relationships.
o1 让测试时计算成为继训练数据、参数与算力之后的另一条扩展轴，也让“推理模型”: o1 makes test-time calculations another axis of expansion after training data, parameters, and computing power, and also makes "inference models" an independent product category.
o1 通过强化学习学习更长的内部推理过程，并随着测试时计算增加而提高表现。它在高: o1 learns longer internal reasoning processes through reinforcement learning and improves performance as test-time computations increase. It demonstrates a different ability curve from ordinary chat models on difficult math, science, and code benchmarks.
OpenAI 发布 GPT-3，拥有 1750 亿参数，展示了令人惊叹的 few: OpenAI released GPT-3, which has 175 billion parameters and demonstrated amazing few-shot learning capabilities, making the world realize for the first time that scale can bring about qualitative changes in capabilities.
OpenAI 发布 GPT-4，首个在视觉和语言能力上都达到顶级水平的大模型，能: OpenAI releases GPT-4, the first large-scale model to achieve state-of-the-art performance in both visual and language capabilities, capable of understanding image input and generating high-quality text, surpassing most human candidates in multiple human exams.
OpenAI 发布 GPT-4o，以同一神经网络处理文本、视觉与音频，让实时语音: OpenAI released GPT-4o, a single model trained across text, vision, and audio. At launch, its text and image capabilities shipped in ChatGPT and the API, while the low-latency audio experience remained a staged preview.
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5，把即时回答、深度推理、代码与工具使用整合进同一模: OpenAI released GPT-5 in ChatGPT as a routed system that selected between a fast model and a deeper reasoning model according to the request. The API exposed separate GPT-5, mini, and nano models with configurable reasoning effort rather than the ChatGPT router itself.
OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.6，以 Sol、Terra、Luna 三档覆盖旗: OpenAI released the GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna tiers on July 9, 2026. The API added programmatic tool calling, explicit prompt caching, and persistent reasoning, while multi-agent orchestration launched in beta rather than as a generally available capability.
OpenAI 发布 o1-preview，把更多计算放到回答前的推理过程，在数学: OpenAI released o1-preview and o1-mini, models trained to spend additional computation on an internal reasoning process before answering. The preview arrived with strict rate limits and without several ChatGPT features, including web browsing and file uploads.
OpenAI 发布了 ChatGPT，一个面向普通用户的对话式 AI 产品，两个: OpenAI released ChatGPT, a conversational AI product for ordinary users. Within two months, the number of monthly active users exceeded 100 million, making it the fastest-growing consumer application in history.
Prompt 不只是一个问题，也可以包含角色、目标、材料、格式和例子。模型会根据: A prompt is not just a question, but can also include roles, goals, materials, format, and examples. The model uses this information to decide what to generate next.
R1 把“前沿推理能力能否开放、能否低成本复现”从假设变成现实问题。它推动行业重: R1 turns "whether cutting-edge reasoning capabilities can be opened up and reproduced at low cost" from a hypothesis to a real issue. It drives the industry to re-evaluate the price of closed-source models, the capabilities boundaries of open models, and the role of reinforcement learning in inference training.
R1 让开放推理模型成为全球焦点，但长期 Agent 工作还需要更大上下文、更稳: R1 brings open inference models into the global spotlight, but long-term agent work also requires greater context, more stable tool usage, and lower inference costs.
RAG 是让大模型接入现实世界知识的核心技术方案。企业知识库、AI 搜索、文档问: RAG is the core technical solution for allowing large models to access real-world knowledge. Scenarios such as enterprise knowledge base, AI search, and document Q&A are mostly based on RAG.
RLHF 是 ChatGPT 对话体验好的关键原因之一。它将一个\"能说话\"的: RLHF is one of the key reasons why the ChatGPT conversation experience is great. It turns a "talking" model into a "human-speaking" model.
RLHF（基于人类反馈的强化学习）: RLHF (reinforcement learning based on human feedback)
RLHF（基于人类反馈的强化学习）｜AI Chronicle: RLHF (Reinforcement Learning Based on Human Feedback) | AI Chronicle
Rumelhart、Hinton 和 Williams 发表了反向传播算法论文，: Rumelhart, Hinton, and Williams published a paper on the backpropagation algorithm, which solved the problem of training multi-layer neural networks and laid the mathematical foundation for deep learning.
Scaling Law 为大模型时代持续扩大训练规模提供了工程和投资依据。: Scaling Law provides the engineering and investment basis for continued expansion of training scale in the era of large models.
SWE-bench 让 Coding Agent 的能力开始有更贴近真实工作的评: SWE-bench allows Coding Agent's capabilities to be evaluated in a way that is closer to real work.
Token 不一定等于一个字或一个单词。模型会把文本切成更适合计算的小片段，再把: Token is not necessarily equal to a word or word. The model cuts the text into smaller pieces that are more suitable for calculations and converts them into numerical representations.
Transformer 成为 NLP 和后续多模态 AI 的统一基础架构。: Transformer becomes the unified infrastructure for NLP and subsequent multimodal AI.
Transformer 是现代 AI 最重要的架构创新。它直接催生了 BERT、: Transformer is the most important architectural innovation in modern AI. It directly gave birth to BERT, GPT series, T5, Llama, Claude and almost all mainstream large language models. The underlying architecture of ChatGPT is Transformer’s decoder.
Transformer 是一种让计算机理解语言的新方法。它的核心创新是\"注意力: Transformer is a new way for computers to understand language. Its core innovation is the "attention mechanism" - when processing each word, the model will pay attention to all other words in the sentence at the same time, instead of looking down word by word like human reading. This allows the model to better understand the context and is easier to train at scale.
V4-Pro 采用 1.6T 总参数、49B 激活参数，面向高难度推理与 Age: V4-Pro uses 1.6T total parameters and 49B activation parameters, and is oriented to highly difficult reasoning and agent programming; V4-Flash provides a faster and more economical option with a smaller activation scale. The official service provides 1M context and thinking/non-thinking dual modes by default.
Word2Vec 让 NLP 从业者可以用向量来表示语言，而不是传统的离散符号。: Word2Vec allows NLP practitioners to represent language using vectors instead of traditional discrete symbols. This is a key step in the shift from symbolic to neural network methods in NLP.
Word2Vec 使用浅层神经网络将每个词映射为一个稠密向量，使得语义相似的词在: Word2Vec uses a shallow neural network to map each word into a dense vector so that semantically similar words are close in the vector space. It also demonstrates the famous semantic operation "king - man + woman ≈ queen".
沿时间，看清 AI 如何走到今天。: Follow the timeline to see how AI arrived here.
把概念放回发生过的历史里。先用人话理解，再继续往技术深处走。: Put each concept back into the history that shaped it. Start in plain language, then go deeper into the technology.
看它在什么时候发布了什么，又把行业推向了哪里。: See what each company released, when it happened, and where it pushed the industry next.
时间解释先后，主题解释一条路线如何形成。: Time explains the sequence; topics explain how a direction took shape.
不追逐每条新闻。: We do not chase every headline.
只保留后来仍值得理解的节点。: We keep the events that remain worth understanding.
OpenAI 推出 Responses API 与 Agents SDK: OpenAI launches the Responses API and Agents SDK
工具、追踪和多 Agent 交接进入统一开发栈: Tools, tracing, and multi-agent handoffs enter one development stack
OpenAI 发布 Responses API、内置网页搜索、文件搜索和计算机使: OpenAI launched the Responses API with built-in web search, file search, and computer use, and open-sourced an Agents SDK for tools, handoffs, guardrails, and tracing.
Assistants API 承担大量托管状态，但开发者需要更直接控制推理循环、: The Assistants API hosted substantial state, but developers wanted more direct control over reasoning loops, tool results, and multi-agent work. Multiple frameworks had implemented similar abstractions independently.
Responses API 统一文本和工具调用响应，内置常用工具；Agents: The Responses API unified text and tool responses with built-in tools. The Agents SDK added lightweight agents, handoffs, guardrails, and tracing, with a migration path from the Assistants API.
Agent Runtime 开始从应用内部胶水变成模型平台的一等产品层。可观测性: The agent runtime moved from application glue to a first-class model-platform layer. Observability, permissions, and multi-agent orchestration were no longer optional framework extras.
应用自行拼接模型调用、工具循环和多 Agent 协作。: Applications assembled model calls, tool loops, and multi-agent collaboration themselves.
模型平台提供统一响应接口与专用 Agent 开发工具。: Model platforms offered unified response APIs and dedicated agent development tools.
常用工具、执行追踪和 Agent 交接可以通过同一套 SDK 组合。: Common tools, execution traces, and agent handoffs could be composed in one SDK.
模型供应商开始围绕 Agent 运行时和工具生态竞争，而不只比较模型分数。: Providers began competing on agent runtimes and tool ecosystems, not only model scores.
1973 年 Lighthill 报告否定英国 AI 研究的实际进展，叠加机器翻: The 1973 Lighthill report rejected the practical progress of British AI research. Together with failures in machine translation and perceptrons, it contributed to a sharp contraction in UK and US public funding.
早期系统只能在规模很小、规则明确的环境中工作，换到真实问题便遭遇组合爆炸。英国政: Early systems worked only in small, well-defined settings and ran into combinatorial explosion on real problems. The UK withdrew most AI funding after the report, while DARPA tightened goals and budgets. The cooling occurred at different times across countries and programs; “the first AI winter” is a later summary of the contraction.
资金下降并非因为智能问题已被证明无解，而是研究承诺、评估尺度和实际能力严重错位。: Funding did not fall because intelligence had been proved impossible. Promises, evaluation scale, and actual capability had drifted too far apart. Every later AI boom faced the same question of whether a demonstration would remain reliable at larger scale.
第二次 AI 寒冬来自维护成本、硬件替代和商业预期落空: Maintenance cost, cheaper hardware, and missed expectations trigger a second AI winter
专家系统专用硬件与软件市场在 1987 年后迅速收缩，企业发现大规模规则库昂贵、: The market for expert-system hardware and software contracted sharply after 1987 as companies found large rule bases expensive, brittle, and difficult to maintain.
1980 年代前半，企业购买 Lisp 机器、知识工程工具和专家系统，供应商把窄: In the early 1980s, companies bought Lisp machines, knowledge-engineering tools, and expert systems, while vendors extrapolated narrow successes into broad automation promises.
通用工作站性能上升、价格下降，专用 Lisp 机器失去优势；项目还受到知识获取瓶: General-purpose workstations became faster and cheaper, removing the advantage of specialized Lisp machines. Projects also suffered from knowledge-acquisition bottlenecks, rule conflicts, and changing environments. Demand, investment, and vendor numbers fell.
这次退潮说明“能做出演示”与“能长期维护的生产系统”是两件事。后来的机器学习浪潮: The downturn exposed the gap between a successful demo and a maintainable production system. Later machine-learning systems still faced drift, evaluation, and operations, even though knowledge was no longer encoded mainly as hand-written rules.
专家系统被当作企业知识自动化的快速路径。: Expert systems were sold as a rapid path to automating enterprise knowledge.
商业市场收缩，AI 进入第二次长期降温。: The commercial market contracted and AI entered a second long cooling period.
AI 再次成为投资者和企业预算中的高风险标签，研究项目更多改用机器学习、智能系统: AI again became a risky label for investors and enterprise budgets, and projects often adopted names such as machine learning or intelligent systems.
两块 GPU、120 万张训练图像和 10.9 个百分点的领先: Two GPUs, 1.2 million training images, and a 10.9-point lead
AlexNet 在 ILSVRC 2012 将 top-5 错误率降到 15.3: AlexNet reduced top-5 error in ILSVRC 2012 to 15.3%, compared with 26.2% for the runner-up. The gap made deep convolutional networks the new baseline for computer vision.
ImageNet 已提供超过百万张带标签训练图像，GPU 也具备适合矩阵计算的并: ImageNet supplied more than a million labeled training images and GPUs offered suitable parallel computation, while mainstream vision systems still relied on hand-engineered features such as SIFT and HOG.
八层 AlexNet 在两块 GTX 580 GPU 上训练，使用 ReLU 加: The eight-layer AlexNet trained across two GTX 580 GPUs, used ReLU for faster optimization, and controlled overfitting with augmentation and dropout. It learned features directly from pixels instead of separating feature engineering from classification.
结果同时验证了数据、GPU 和深层网络的组合。此后视觉研究迅速放弃大量手工特征，: The result validated the combination of data, GPUs, and deep networks. Vision research rapidly moved away from hand-engineered features, and compute and training data became as decisive as algorithms.
预测对象从蛋白质结构扩大到蛋白质、DNA、RNA 与配体复合物: Prediction expands from protein structure to complexes with DNA, RNA, and ligands
Google DeepMind 与 Isomorphic Labs 发布 Alp: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs introduced AlphaFold 3, using diffusion-based structure generation to predict complexes of proteins and other biomolecules.
AlphaFold 2 大幅提高单个蛋白质结构预测，但药物发现和细胞机制更关心蛋: AlphaFold 2 greatly improved individual protein-structure prediction, but drug discovery and cell biology depend on interactions among proteins, DNA, RNA, small molecules, and antibodies.
新模型统一表示多种分子，并用 Pairformer 和扩散模块直接生成三维原子坐: The new model represented multiple molecule types in one system and used a Pairformer and diffusion module to generate 3D atomic coordinates. The paper reported gains over specialized methods across several complex types.
AlphaFold 的价值从“查一个蛋白质形状”扩展到研究结合与作用机制，更接近: AlphaFold moved from looking up one protein shape toward studying binding and mechanism, closer to drug-design workflows. The initial server-only access also raised reproducibility concerns.
AlphaFold 主要解决蛋白质及部分复合物的结构预测。: AlphaFold mainly addressed proteins and some protein complexes.
同一模型覆盖更广的生物分子类型和相互作用。: One model covered a broader set of biomolecules and interactions.
生物研究者获得统一预测多类分子复合物的工具。: Biology researchers gained one tool for predicting several kinds of molecular complex.
AI for Science 进一步进入药物发现的结构假设与候选筛选环节。: AI for Science moved further into structural hypotheses and candidate screening for drug discovery.
CASP14 上接近实验精度的蛋白质结构预测: Protein-structure prediction approaches experimental accuracy at CASP14
AlphaFold 2 在 CASP14 盲测的全部目标上取得 92.4 的中位: AlphaFold 2 achieved a median GDT_TS of 92.4 across all CASP14 targets, with many predictions approaching experimental accuracy. The result concerned single-chain structure prediction, not protein dynamics, interactions, or every class of complex.
蛋白质的氨基酸序列容易读取，三维结构却通常需要 X 射线晶体学、冷冻电镜或核磁共: Amino-acid sequences are easy to read, but 3D structures usually require expensive experiments such as X-ray crystallography, cryo-EM, or NMR. Traditional computation struggled to search the enormous conformational space reliably.
模型结合多序列比对、残基对表示和结构模块，直接预测原子坐标与置信度。2021 年: The model combined multiple-sequence alignments, pair representations, and a structure module to predict atomic coordinates and confidence. Code followed in 2021, and AlphaFold DB expanded beyond 200 million predictions. It predicts structures, not the complete folding process or biological function.
研究者可以先用预测结构形成假设，再决定哪些实验最值得做。它显著扩大了结构信息的覆: Researchers could use predicted structures to form hypotheses before choosing expensive experiments. Coverage expanded dramatically, while drug action, dynamics, and low-confidence regions still required experimental validation.
策略网络、价值网络与树搜索赢下五局制比赛: Policy networks, value networks, and tree search win a five-game match
AlphaGo 在首尔五局赛中以 4 比 1 战胜李世石。系统把人类棋谱学习、自: AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol 4–1 in a five-game match in Seoul by combining learning from human games, self-play, and Monte Carlo tree search.
策略网络缩小候选落子范围，价值网络估计局面胜率，搜索在两者引导下分配计算。第二局: A policy network narrowed candidate moves, a value network estimated winning chances, and search allocated computation using both. Move 37 in game two became famous for defying professional intuition, while Lee’s move 78 in game four exposed failures in unusual positions.
围棋无法靠穷举解决，胜利来自学习与搜索的分工。这个架构影响了后来的 AlphaZ: Go cannot be solved by brute force. The victory came from dividing work between learning and search. The architecture led to AlphaZero and made self-generated training experience an important method for complex decisions.
AlphaZero 用自我博弈统一棋类学习: AlphaZero unifies game learning through self-play
不再依赖人类棋谱，规则与自我对弈足以产生策略: Rules and self-play replace human game records
DeepMind 发布 AlphaZero，用同一套自我对弈、策略—价值网络和蒙: DeepMind introduced AlphaZero, applying the same combination of self-play, a policy-and-value network, and Monte Carlo tree search separately to chess, shogi, and Go. Each game used its own training run from random parameters rather than one shared trained network.
AlphaGo 结合人类棋谱监督学习、自我对弈和人工设计的搜索流程，证明深度强化: AlphaGo combined supervised learning from human games, self-play, and a carefully designed search pipeline. It solved Go but remained tailored to one game.
AlphaZero 使用一套通用网络预测走子概率和局面价值，再用蒙特卡洛树搜索产: AlphaZero used one general network to predict moves and position value, while Monte Carlo tree search produced stronger training targets. Each game started from random play without human strategy data.
它把“专家数据”从必要条件变成可选加速项，展示了规则明确、可大量模拟的环境中，自: It turned expert data from a requirement into an optional accelerator, showing that self-generated experience could surpass accumulated human play in environments with clear rules and cheap simulation.
高水平游戏 AI 依赖大量人类棋谱和针对任务的工程。: High-level game AI depended on human records and task-specific engineering.
同一训练方法可以从规则出发掌握多种棋类。: One training method could master multiple games from rules alone.
自我博弈、搜索与价值网络的组合成为强化学习的重要参考架构。: The combination of self-play, search, and value networks became a major reference architecture for reinforcement learning.
研究注意力进一步转向能通过环境反馈自主改进的通用学习系统。: Research attention moved further toward general systems that improve from environmental feedback.
线程、文件检索与代码执行成为托管能力: Threads, file retrieval, and code execution become hosted primitives
OpenAI 在 DevDay 以测试版发布 Assistants API，定义: At DevDay, OpenAI launched the Assistants API in beta, defining hosted Assistant, Thread, Message, and Run objects with retrieval, Code Interpreter, and function calling. It moved conversation state onto the platform while introducing a provider-defined run state machine.
开发者需要自己保存对话、截断上下文、上传文件、运行工具并把结果拼回提示。大量应用: Developers had to store conversations, trim context, upload files, run tools, and return results to prompts. Many applications rebuilt the same agent infrastructure.
API 引入 Assistant、Thread、Message 和 Run 等对: The API introduced Assistant, Thread, Message, and Run objects, with the platform managing execution state and tool calls. It later entered a migration path after the Responses API and Agents SDK arrived.
它首次把 Agent 循环作为模型提供商的托管产品交付，也暴露高度抽象 API: It was an early provider-hosted agent loop and also exposed the debugging, migration, and lock-in costs of a highly abstract API.
Agent 状态和工具循环主要由应用自行管理。: Applications managed agent state and tool loops themselves.
模型供应商开始提供托管的有状态 Agent API。: Model providers offered hosted stateful agent APIs.
构建带文件和工具的助手所需后端代码显著减少。: Building assistants with files and tools required much less backend code.
模型平台开始承接会话状态、检索和执行环境，而不只提供一次推理。: Model platforms began hosting conversation state, retrieval, and execution rather than only individual inferences.
Rumelhart、Hinton 与 Williams 展示如何用误差反向传播训: David Rumelhart, Geoffrey Hinton, and Ronald Williams showed how error backpropagation could train multilayer networks and let hidden layers form internal representations from examples.
链式法则和反向求导思想此前已有多次独立发现，难点在于如何把它变成训练多层连接主义: The chain rule and reverse differentiation had been discovered independently before. The challenge was to present them as a clear training method for multilayer connectionist models and show what hidden units learned.
前向计算得到输出和误差，误差信号再按链式法则逐层传回，每个权重沿降低误差的方向更: A forward pass produced outputs and errors, then the chain rule propagated error signals backward so each weight could move in a loss-reducing direction. Experiments showed hidden representations for symmetry and family relationships.
多层网络终于有了通用、可复用的训练办法。现代自动微分框架仍执行同一基本过程，不过: Multilayer networks gained a general reusable training method. Modern automatic-differentiation frameworks still perform the same basic process, though practical capability also depends on activations, initialization, data, compute, and optimization.
双向预训练成为 NLP 的通用底座: Bidirectional pretraining becomes a general NLP base
Google 发布 BERT，以掩码语言建模和下一句预测预训练双向 Transf: Google introduced BERT, pretraining a bidirectional Transformer encoder with masked-language modeling and next-sentence prediction. The 340-million-parameter BERT-Large set new results on 11 tasks, including GLUE and SQuAD, with small task-specific output layers.
GPT-1 已验证生成式预训练，但从左到右读取文本会限制需要同时利用前后文的理解: GPT-1 validated generative pretraining, but left-to-right reading limited tasks that needed both preceding and following context. ELMo offered bidirectional representations without one unified deep pretrained model.
BERT 随机遮住输入 token 并预测它们，同时训练句子关系任务。模型结构使: BERT masked random input tokens and predicted them while also training a sentence-relationship objective. Its Transformer encoder could inspect context on both sides of a masked word.
BERT 让预训练模型成为搜索、分类、抽取和问答的默认起点，并推动模型中心的 N: BERT made pretrained models the default starting point for search, classification, extraction, and question answering and accelerated model-centered NLP engineering. It excelled at understanding tasks rather than open-ended generation.
聊天界面把指令微调模型交到大众手中: A chat interface puts an instruction-tuned model in public hands
OpenAI 以免费“研究预览”发布基于 GPT-3.5 的 ChatGPT，把: OpenAI released ChatGPT as a free research preview, placing a GPT-3.5 model trained with human feedback in a browser chat interface that retained conversational context. It supported follow-up questions, rewriting, and code explanation while still producing confident falsehoods.
InstructGPT 已证明人类反馈能改善指令遵循，GPT-3.5 也通过 A: InstructGPT had shown that human feedback improved instruction following, and GPT-3.5 was available through APIs, but using an API still required development experience. Web chat reduced the barrier to something closer to search or messaging.
产品保留同一会话中的上下文，并允许用户对回答点赞或点踩，继续收集偏好数据。模型仍: The product retained conversational context and collected thumbs-up and thumbs-down feedback. The model still fabricated facts, had a limited context window, and could be prompted around safety rules.
ChatGPT 给通用大模型提供了大众入口和快速反馈回路。教育、写作、编程与办公: ChatGPT gave general-purpose language models a mass-market interface and rapid feedback loop. People used one model across education, writing, coding, and office work, and technology companies quickly moved conversational AI into core product plans.
Claude 5 系列按长期 Agent 与主力工作负载重新划分模型档位。: Claude 5 reorganized model tiers around long-running agents and mainstream workloads.
Anthropic 随 Claude 3.7 Sonnet 发布 Claude: Anthropic released a research preview of Claude Code alongside Claude 3.7 Sonnet. The command-line tool read repositories, edited files, ran commands, and requested permission before higher-risk actions.
Copilot 和 Cursor 把模型放进编辑器，Devin 把任务放进独立工: Copilot and Cursor placed models inside editors, while Devin put tasks in an independent workspace. Many engineers still treated the terminal, Git, and test commands as the center of real development.
Claude Code 在本地进程中搜索代码、编辑文件和执行测试，可使用 CLA: Claude Code searched code, edited files, and ran tests in a local process, used CLAUDE.md for project instructions, and connected to GitHub and MCP tools. It was not autonomous by default; results depended on permissions, context, tests, and user supervision.
终端让模型接触软件工程的完整反馈回路：查看状态、修改、执行、读错误再重试。AI: The terminal exposed the full software-engineering feedback loop of inspecting state, editing, executing, reading errors, and retrying. The product unit of AI coding expanded from a suggestion to a reviewable sequence of actions.
宪法式 AI 进入面向企业的对话产品: Constitutional AI enters an enterprise-oriented assistant
Anthropic 发布 Claude，并通过 API 及 Slack、Noti: Anthropic launched Claude through an API and partners including Slack and Notion. The company emphasized predictability, fewer harmful outputs, and long-form work—product claims rather than independent certification of accuracy or safety.
ChatGPT 已证明对话式大模型的需求，企业同时担心幻觉、越权回答和敏感数据。: ChatGPT had demonstrated demand for conversational models, while enterprises worried about hallucination, unsafe behavior, and sensitive data. Anthropic, founded by former OpenAI members, focused on interpretability and alignment.
Claude 通过 Slack 等合作入口和 API 上线，支持摘要、搜索、写作: Claude launched through partners including Slack and through an API, supporting summarization, search, writing, and code. Its training approach combined human feedback with Constitutional AI, using written principles to generate and critique responses.
Claude 建立了与 GPT 长期竞争的第二条前沿模型产品线，也把安全方法、上: Claude established a second durable frontier-model product line alongside GPT and made safety methods, context length, and enterprise reliability central dimensions of model choice.
ChatGPT 和 GPT API 主导新一轮生成式 AI 产品注意力。: ChatGPT and the GPT API dominated attention in the new generative-AI market.
Claude 成为独立模型家族，并形成安全与长上下文差异化路线。: Claude became an independent model family differentiated by safety and long-context work.
开发者获得另一套前沿模型 API，并开始按任务在多家模型之间选择。: Developers gained another frontier API and began selecting among providers by task.
前沿模型市场从单一领先产品转向多个实验室持续竞速。: The frontier market shifted from one leading product to sustained competition among labs.
OpenAI Codex 云端编程 Agent 上线: OpenAI launches the cloud Codex coding agent
多个软件任务在隔离环境中并行执行: Multiple software tasks run in parallel inside isolated environments
OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中发布 Codex 研究预览，为每个任务启动隔: OpenAI launched a Codex research preview in ChatGPT, creating isolated cloud environments where tasks could read repositories, edit code, run tests, and return patch evidence.
Claude Code 等终端 Agent 在本机持续协作，Devin 展示独立: Terminal agents such as Claude Code collaborated continuously on local machines, while Devin demonstrated an independent engineering environment. Teams also wanted to delegate multiple long-running tasks without occupying local sessions.
用户连接 GitHub 仓库后可并行启动任务。Agent 在预装仓库的容器中运行: After connecting a GitHub repository, users could start tasks in parallel. Each agent ran commands in a container with the repository and returned logs, tests, and code citations, initially powered by codex-1.
AI Coding 出现清晰分工。终端 Agent 适合同步协作，云端 Agen: AI coding gained a clearer division of labor. Terminal agents fit synchronous collaboration, while cloud agents fit isolated, verifiable, parallel background tasks. Teams began managing agent queues rather than only completions.
一个开发者通常在一个本地会话中与一个编程助手协作。: One developer usually worked with one coding assistant in one local session.
多个 Agent 可以在隔离环境中并行处理仓库任务。: Multiple agents could handle repository tasks in parallel inside isolated environments.
修 bug、补测试和小型功能可以并行委托，并以日志和测试结果验收。: Bug fixes, tests, and small features could be delegated in parallel and reviewed through logs and test results.
编程 Agent 从单个交互界面扩展到云端任务队列和代码审查流程。: Coding agents expanded from one interactive interface into cloud task queues and code-review workflows.
OpenAI Codex 把 GPT-3 适配到代码: OpenAI Codex adapts GPT-3 to code
自然语言开始直接驱动代码生成: Natural language begins driving code generation directly
OpenAI 发布 Codex API 私有测试版。Codex 由 GPT-3: OpenAI released the Codex API in private beta. Codex extended GPT-3 with training on public code; the 12B model solved 28.8% of HumanEval problems with one sample and supplied the model behind early GitHub Copilot.
GPT-3 已能根据提示生成短代码，但对编程语言、库调用和函数意图的稳定性有限。: GPT-3 could generate short code from prompts but was unreliable with programming languages, library calls, and function intent. Developers needed a model adapted to code and a usable interface.
Codex 支持十多种编程语言，可把自然语言说明转换成函数、补全代码并调用已有: Codex supported more than a dozen programming languages, translating natural-language instructions into functions, completing code, and calling existing APIs. OpenAI also demonstrated controlling games and applications through generated code.
它把代码明确成模型可生成、可执行的行动媒介。AI Coding 从研究评测进入编: It established code as an executable action medium for language models. AI coding moved from research benchmarks into editors and APIs, directly anticipating agents that act through tools.
AI 编程工具主要补全局部 token 或基于规则分析代码。: AI programming tools mainly completed local tokens or analyzed code with rules.
模型可以根据意图生成成段代码，并通过 API 被其他产品调用。: Models could generate blocks of code from intent and be embedded in products through APIs.
自然语言描述和代码上下文成为新的编程输入方式。: Natural-language descriptions and surrounding code became new forms of programming input.
代码补全产品从统计建议升级为能生成完整函数的模型助手。: Code completion moved from statistical suggestions to model-generated functions.
CUDA 把 GPU 变成通用计算平台: CUDA turns the GPU into a general computing platform
熟悉的编程模型让并行算力进入开发者工具链: A familiar programming model brings parallel compute into the developer toolchain
NVIDIA 发布 CUDA，让开发者用 C 风格工具直接编写在 GPU 上运行: NVIDIA introduced CUDA, allowing developers to write general parallel programs for GPUs with C-like tools.
GPU 已拥有大量并行计算单元，但通用计算需要把问题改写成图形着色流程，开发门槛: GPUs already contained large numbers of parallel units, but general computation had to be expressed through graphics pipelines, making development difficult and the ecosystem fragile.
CUDA 提供编程模型、编译器、运行时和数学库，让线程、内存层次与 GPU 内核: CUDA supplied a programming model, compiler, runtime, and math libraries, making threads, memory hierarchies, and GPU kernels ordinary software-engineering concerns. Libraries such as cuDNN later packaged neural-network operations.
深度学习需要重复执行大规模矩阵运算。CUDA 让研究者不必自己发明一套硬件和工具: Deep learning repeatedly performs large matrix operations. CUDA let researchers benefit from improving commodity GPUs without building a new hardware and software stack for each project.
通用 GPU 计算需要借用图形 API，应用开发困难。: General GPU computing required adapting problems to graphics APIs.
并行计算拥有稳定编程平台，并与深度学习框架共同演化。: Parallel computing had a stable platform that evolved alongside deep-learning frameworks.
GPU 加速从特殊图形技巧变成有文档、库和调试工具支持的平台能力。: GPU acceleration moved from a graphics trick to a platform supported by documentation, libraries, and debugging tools.
NVIDIA 的软硬件生态逐渐成为训练和推理基础设施的事实标准。: NVIDIA’s combined hardware and software ecosystem became the de facto foundation for AI training and inference.
Cursor 确立 AI 原生编辑器路线: Cursor establishes the AI-native editor category
补全、聊天、代码库检索和多文件修改进入同一界面: Completion, chat, repository retrieval, and multi-file edits share one interface
Anysphere 宣布完成 6000 万美元 A 轮融资。Cursor 已把模: Anysphere announced a $60 million Series A. Cursor had integrated model chat, repository indexing, and generative editing directly into a VS Code-based development environment.
GitHub Copilot 已证明行内补全价值，但开发者仍在编辑器、网页聊天和: GitHub Copilot had proven the value of inline completion, but developers still moved between editors, web chat, and copy-paste. Whole-repository understanding required indexing and context selection.
Cursor 保留熟悉的 VS Code 生态，同时加入可引用文件和符号的聊天、: Cursor kept the familiar VS Code ecosystem while adding chat that referenced files and symbols, semantic code search, and edits across locations. Composer and Agent modes later expanded work to multiple files and the terminal.
它证明 AI Coding 可以成为编辑器的主交互逻辑，而非附加侧栏。产品竞争也: It showed that AI coding could become the editor’s primary interaction model rather than an added sidebar. Competition expanded from model quality to context gathering, editing experience, and workflow speed.
AI 是传统编辑器中的补全插件或聊天侧栏。: AI appeared as a completion plugin or chat sidebar in a traditional editor.
编辑器围绕模型上下文和生成式操作重新组织。: The editor was reorganized around model context and generative operations.
代码库问答、批量编辑和模型补全在一个持续上下文中完成。: Repository questions, batch edits, and completion happened within one persistent context.
AI 原生编辑器成为独立产品类别，并迫使传统 IDE 加速整合 Agent 能力: AI-native editors became a product category and pushed traditional IDEs to integrate agent capabilities faster.
“Artificial Intelligence”成为一项共同研究议程: Artificial Intelligence becomes a shared research agenda
1956 年夏天，研究者在达特茅斯学院讨论学习、语言、抽象和自我改进机器。项目提: In the summer of 1956, researchers at Dartmouth discussed learning, language, abstraction, and self-improving machines. The proposal named this cluster of problems “Artificial Intelligence.”
McCarthy、Minsky、Rochester 与 Shannon 在 19: McCarthy, Minsky, Rochester, and Shannon proposed in 1955 that ten researchers working for one summer could advance machine learning and simulations of intelligence. Participants visited at different times rather than attending one continuous two-month meeting, and no unified theory emerged.
它把此前分散在控制论、计算、心理学和神经模型中的问题聚合成一个名称和社群。这个名: It gathered problems from cybernetics, computation, psychology, and neural models under one name and community. That name later shaped departments, funding, conferences, and public understanding of the field.
专用芯片与大规模搜索赢下六局制人机赛: Specialized chips and large-scale search win a six-game match
IBM 深蓝在纽约六局重赛中以 3.5 比 2.5 战胜国际象棋世界冠军 Gar: IBM Deep Blue defeated world chess champion Garry Kasparov 3.5–2.5 in a six-game rematch in New York, the first computer to beat a reigning champion under standard match conditions.
深蓝使用专用棋类芯片，每秒评估约 2 亿个局面，再结合搜索、开局库、残局库和由特: Deep Blue used specialized chess chips to evaluate roughly 200 million positions per second, combining search with opening books, endgame databases, and an evaluation function tuned by grandmasters. It was highly specialized and could not transfer its skill to other tasks.
比赛让公众看到大规模计算和领域知识可以在复杂智力任务上超过人类。它也划清了一条边: The match showed a mass audience that computation and domain knowledge could surpass humans on a complex intellectual task. It also clarified that winning chess did not imply general reasoning or learning.
深度置信网络重启深层学习: Deep belief networks revive deep learning
逐层预训练让更深的神经网络重新可训练: Layer-wise pretraining makes deeper neural networks practical again
Hinton、Osindero 与 Teh 提出深度置信网络的快速逐层训练方法，: Geoffrey Hinton, Simon Osindero, and Yee-Whye Teh introduced a fast layer-wise method for training deep belief networks, making deep learning experimentally viable again.
反向传播可以训练多层网络，但深层模型容易受梯度、初始化、数据和算力限制，1990: Backpropagation could train multilayer networks, but deeper models were constrained by gradients, initialization, data, and compute, and often lost ground to kernel methods in the 1990s.
论文先用无监督方式逐层训练受限玻尔兹曼机，再对整个网络进行有监督微调。这个流程为: The paper first trained restricted Boltzmann machines layer by layer without supervision, then fine-tuned the full network with labels. The process supplied better initial representations for deep networks.
这不是今天深度网络的最终训练方法，但它恢复了对深层表示学习的信心，并连接到随后由: This was not the final recipe used by modern deep networks, but it restored confidence in deep representation learning and connected directly to later gains from large datasets, GPUs, ReLU, and better optimization.
深层网络被认为训练困难，研究注意力集中在较浅模型和手工特征。: Deep networks were considered hard to train, and research emphasized shallow models and hand-engineered features.
表示可以由多层模型从数据中逐级学习，深度网络研究重新加速。: Layered models could learn representations from data, accelerating deep-network research again.
深层神经网络重新成为可以稳定复现和继续改进的实验对象。: Deep neural networks again became experiments that researchers could reproduce and improve.
“深度学习”从边缘术语逐步变成计算机视觉、语音和语言技术的共同路线。: Deep learning moved from a marginal term toward a common approach across vision, speech, and language.
把深度学习、强化学习与通用智能目标放进同一家公司: Combining deep learning, reinforcement learning, and a general-intelligence mission
Demis Hassabis、Shane Legg 与 Mustafa Sule: Demis Hassabis, Shane Legg, and Mustafa Suleyman founded DeepMind in London to build general learning systems and apply them to real problems.
深度学习重新升温，但研究大多按视觉、语音、控制等任务分散推进。强化学习也缺少能在: Deep learning was regaining momentum, but research remained divided across vision, speech, control, and other tasks. Reinforcement learning also lacked representations that scaled reliably to complex environments.
DeepMind 组建跨神经科学、机器学习和工程的团队，先用 Atari 游戏验: DeepMind assembled researchers from neuroscience, machine learning, and engineering, first demonstrating deep reinforcement learning from pixels in Atari games and later building AlphaGo, AlphaZero, and AlphaFold.
它形成了一条连续可见的研究路线，从通用学习算法走到科学应用，也改变了大型科技公司: It built a visible research line from general learning algorithms to scientific applications and changed how large technology companies organized frontier AI research.
深度学习和强化学习主要在相对分散的学术项目中发展。: Deep learning and reinforcement learning advanced mainly through relatively dispersed academic projects.
资金充足的研究实验室开始长期整合算法、算力和工程团队。: Well-funded research labs began combining algorithms, compute, and engineering over long time horizons.
Google 在 2014 年收购 DeepMind，前沿 AI 实验室成为科技: Google acquired DeepMind in 2014, and frontier AI labs became an important way for technology companies to compete for talent and long-term research capacity.
技术报告把训练资源、MoE 设计和稳定训练细节放进公开讨论，使前沿模型的成本不再: The report brought training resources, MoE design, and stability details into public discussion, reducing reliance on outside guesses about frontier-model cost. Its pretraining estimate excluded the full cost of research, data, and infrastructure and should not be treated as the project’s total price.
Devin 把“软件工程 Agent”带入大众视野: Devin brings the software-engineering agent into public view
一个产品同时操作编辑器、终端和浏览器: One product operates an editor, terminal, and browser
Cognition 公布 Devin，展示一个在沙箱中规划任务、编辑代码、运行命: Cognition announced Devin, a software-engineering agent that planned work, edited code, ran commands, browsed documentation, and delivered results inside a sandbox.
Copilot 与 Cursor 已改善代码生成和编辑，但大部分工作仍由开发者逐: Copilot and Cursor had improved code generation and editing, but developers still directed most steps. SWE-bench introduced a measure of end-to-end repository repair.
Devin 的演示界面同时显示聊天、Shell、编辑器和浏览器。官方报告其在 S: Devin’s interface combined chat, shell, editor, and browser. Cognition reported 13.86% on SWE-bench, while the comparison method and presentation later drew reproducibility and marketing criticism.
无论首版能力是否达到宣传，它都让“把 Issue 交给 Agent，再等待结果”: Whatever the first version’s practical limits, it established “assign an issue and wait for an agent” as a clear product category and moved AI coding toward autonomous execution.
AI Coding 产品主要等待开发者逐条提问和确认修改。: AI coding products mainly waited for developers to ask and approve each step.
产品开始承诺在独立环境中持续执行完整工程任务。: Products began promising sustained execution of complete engineering tasks in isolated environments.
编程助手的评价开始包含任务规划、环境操作、测试和结果交付。: Coding assistants were judged on planning, environment use, testing, and delivery.
软件工程 Agent 成为创业公司和基础模型厂商共同竞争的赛道。: Software-engineering agents became a shared competitive field for startups and model providers.
DDPM 让扩散模型成为实用生成路线: DDPM makes diffusion a practical generative path
从噪声逐步还原图像，训练更稳定: Recovering images from noise through a stable iterative process
Ho、Jain 与 Abbeel 提出 DDPM：训练网络预测逐步加入图像的噪声: Jonathan Ho, Ajay Jain, and Pieter Abbeel introduced DDPM, training a network to predict noise and sampling through a 1,000-step reverse process. The paper reported a 3.17 FID and 9.46 Inception Score on CIFAR-10.
GAN 能生成锐利图像，但训练容易不稳定并出现模式崩塌。早期扩散模型有清晰概率解: GANs produced sharp images but were unstable and prone to mode collapse. Earlier diffusion models had a clear probabilistic interpretation but were not yet practical in quality or efficiency.
前向过程逐步把数据变成高斯噪声，神经网络学习预测每一步加入的噪声，采样时从随机噪: A forward process gradually turned data into Gaussian noise. A neural network learned to predict the noise added at each step, then generated an image by iteratively reversing the process from random noise.
扩散模型随后在图像质量、条件控制和文本引导上迅速超过 GAN，成为 DALL·E: Diffusion models soon surpassed GANs in image quality, conditioning, and text guidance, becoming a shared foundation for DALL·E 2, Imagen, Stable Diffusion, and video generation.
扩散模型成为图像和视频生成的主流基础架构。: Diffusion became the mainstream foundation for image and video generation.
生成图像获得更稳定的训练目标和更灵活的条件控制。: Image generation gained a more stable training objective and flexible conditioning.
文生图从研究演示发展成普通用户可以反复控制和编辑的产品能力。: Text-to-image moved from research demonstrations to a controllable, iterative user product.
ELIZA 展示对话程序的投射效应: ELIZA reveals the projection effect of chatbots
简单模式匹配也能让人误读机器的理解能力: Simple pattern matching can still be mistaken for understanding
Joseph Weizenbaum 发表 ELIZA 论文：程序按优先级寻找关键: Joseph Weizenbaum published ELIZA, which selected prioritized keywords and transformed input with decomposition and reassembly rules. Its famous DOCTOR script imitated Rogerian interviewing without constructing a semantic model of the conversation.
自然语言被视为通向机器智能的重要入口，但当时的程序几乎没有语义理解能力。: Natural language was seen as an important route to machine intelligence, but programs of the time had almost no semantic understanding.
最著名的 DOCTOR 脚本模仿罗杰斯式心理治疗师，经常把用户的话改写成问题。程: Its best-known DOCTOR script imitated a Rogerian therapist, often turning a user’s words back into questions. The rules were shallow, yet some users confided in it and attributed understanding to the program.
ELIZA 同时留下了产品机会和警告。对话界面能显著降低使用门槛，但流畅互动会让: ELIZA left both an opportunity and a warning. Conversation lowers the barrier to using software, but fluent interaction can cause users to overestimate a system’s understanding and judgment.
人机交互主要依赖命令和结构化输入。: Human-computer interaction relied mainly on commands and structured input.
开放式文字对话成为长期反复出现的产品形态。: Open-ended text conversation became a recurring product form.
“ELIZA 效应”后来用于描述人们把理解、意图和情感投射给程序的倾向。: The “ELIZA effect” now describes the tendency to project understanding, intention, and emotion onto software.
聊天机器人证明了自然语言可以成为普通人使用计算机的界面。: Chatbots showed that natural language could serve as an interface for ordinary computer users.
欧盟《人工智能法案》正式公布: The European Union publishes the AI Act
首套综合性 AI 法律按风险划定义务: The first broad AI law assigns duties by risk level
欧盟在官方公报发布《人工智能法案》，建立禁止用途、高风险系统、透明度和通用 AI: The European Union published the AI Act in its Official Journal, establishing tiered rules for prohibited uses, high-risk systems, transparency, and general-purpose AI models.
各国此前主要依靠隐私、消费者保护和行业法规处理 AI。生成式模型快速普及后，模型: Countries had previously relied on privacy, consumer-protection, and sector rules for AI. Rapid adoption of generative models made the duties of providers, deployers, and downstream products more urgent.
法案禁止部分不可接受用途，对医疗、就业、教育等高风险系统规定数据、记录和监督义务: The law prohibited certain unacceptable uses, imposed data, record-keeping, and oversight duties on high-risk systems, and added obligations for general-purpose and systemic-risk models. Provisions entered into force in stages.
它把 AI 治理从自愿原则推进到可执行法律，并产生类似 GDPR 的域外影响。企: It moved AI governance from voluntary principles to enforceable law and created extraterritorial effects similar to GDPR. Companies had to bring risk classification, documentation, and evaluation into product development.
AI 监管以原则、行业规则和个案执法为主。: AI governance relied mainly on principles, sector rules, and case-by-case enforcement.
综合风险分类和通用模型义务进入成文法。: Comprehensive risk classes and general-purpose model duties entered statute.
高风险系统需要可追溯数据、技术文档、日志和人工监督设计。: High-risk systems require traceable data, technical documentation, logs, and human oversight.
模型和应用进入欧洲市场需要按角色和风险承担不同合规义务。: Models and applications entering Europe carry different compliance duties by role and risk.
把专家知识写进规则，再让机器缩小搜索空间: Encoding expert knowledge as rules to narrow a difficult search
Joshua Lederberg、Edward Feigenbaum、Carl: At Stanford, Joshua Lederberg, Edward Feigenbaum, Carl Djerassi, Bruce Buchanan, and collaborators developed DENDRAL to generate and prune candidate molecular structures with chemical constraints and mass-spectrometry evidence. It assisted experts within selected compound classes rather than covering all of chemistry.
通用问题求解器在真实专业领域中容易遇到组合爆炸。缺少领域知识时，程序需要搜索太多: General problem solvers ran into combinatorial explosion in real expert domains. Without domain knowledge, programs had to explore too many possible answers.
DENDRAL 将化学家的规则与计算机搜索结合，先生成候选分子，再用实验数据排除: DENDRAL combined chemists’ rules with computer search, generating candidate molecules and rejecting structures inconsistent with experimental data. Its knowledge was engineered with experts rather than learned from data.
它说明窄领域里的高质量知识可以比“通用智能”更快产生实用结果，并催生了 MYCI: It showed that high-quality knowledge in a narrow domain could produce useful results sooner than general intelligence, leading to systems such as MYCIN and XCON and to the knowledge-engineering industry.
早期 AI 强调跨任务的通用问题求解。: Early AI emphasized general problem solving across tasks.
大量项目转向窄领域知识库和规则驱动的专家系统。: Many projects shifted toward narrow-domain knowledge bases and rule-driven expert systems.
专家系统在 1980 年代形成商业热潮，也暴露出规则维护昂贵、难以覆盖例外的问题: Expert systems drove a commercial boom in the 1980s while exposing the cost and brittleness of maintaining large rule bases.
AI 首次以可部署的专业决策辅助系统进入科学和企业场景。: AI entered scientific and enterprise settings as deployable expert decision support.
OpenAI API 加入函数调用: The OpenAI API adds function calling
模型输出从自然语言变成可校验的工具参数: Model output becomes validated arguments for software tools
OpenAI 在 0613 版 GPT-4 与 GPT-3.5 Turbo 中加: OpenAI added function calling to the 0613 versions of GPT-4 and GPT-3.5 Turbo. Developers declared functions with JSON Schema and received a function name and arguments; the application still had to validate, execute, and return the result.
早期开发者让模型用自然语言或约定格式输出命令，再自行解析。格式漂移、字段缺失和提: Early developers asked models to emit commands in natural language or improvised formats and parsed them manually. Format drift, missing fields, and prompt injection made tool integration fragile.
API 接收函数名称、说明和 JSON Schema。模型返回结构化调用意图，应: The API accepted function names, descriptions, and JSON Schema. The model returned a structured call, the application validated and executed it, and the result could be sent back for the next response.
它给语言模型和确定性软件之间建立了稳定边界。搜索、数据库、业务 API 与执行环: It created a stable boundary between language models and deterministic software, enabling search, databases, business APIs, and execution environments to form auditable agent loops.
应用从自由文本中猜测模型想调用什么以及参数是什么。: Applications inferred tools and arguments from free-form model text.
模型与软件通过明确的结构化调用合同协作。: Models and software collaborated through an explicit structured-call contract.
工具调用不再依赖脆弱的正则表达式和提示格式约定。: Tool integration no longer depended on brittle regular expressions and prompt-format conventions.
助手可以查询实时数据和执行操作，而不只回答训练语料中的知识。: Assistants could query live data and take actions instead of only answering from trained knowledge.
生成器与判别器在竞争中共同提高: A generator and discriminator improve through competition
Ian Goodfellow 等人提出生成对抗网络，以同一个 minimax 目: Ian Goodfellow and colleagues introduced generative adversarial networks, training a generator and discriminator through one minimax objective. Experiments used MNIST, the Toronto Face Database, and CIFAR-10, and the paper noted the need to keep the two learners synchronized.
生成模型通常需要明确写出概率分布或使用近似推断，训练和采样都可能复杂。研究者需要: Generative models often required explicit probability distributions or approximate inference, making training and sampling difficult. Researchers wanted a more direct way to learn data distributions.
生成器把随机噪声映射成样本，判别器输出样本来自真实数据的概率。训练目标形成二人零: The generator mapped random noise to samples, while the discriminator estimated whether a sample came from real data. Their objective formed a two-player minimax game whose ideal equilibrium matched the data distribution.
GAN 在图像生成、编辑和风格迁移上快速取得清晰结果，开启了现代生成视觉浪潮；训: GANs quickly produced sharp results in image generation, editing, and style transfer, starting the modern generative-vision wave. Instability and mode collapse also drove extensive follow-up work.
高质量图像生成仍受概率建模和推断方法限制。: High-quality image generation remained constrained by probabilistic modeling and inference methods.
对抗训练成为一条独立而活跃的生成模型路线。: Adversarial training became a distinct and highly active generative-model path.
生成模型从研究小众变成计算机视觉的重要工具箱。: Generative models moved from a niche topic into the main computer-vision toolbox.
人脸合成、图像编辑与深度伪造开始进入实际应用和公共讨论。: Face synthesis, image editing, and deepfakes entered practical products and public debate.
从训练阶段统一文本、图像、音频与视频: Text, images, audio, and video are unified from training onward
Google DeepMind 发布 Gemini 1.0，以 Ultra、Pr: Google DeepMind launched Gemini 1.0 in Ultra, Pro, and Nano sizes for data centers, general products, and on-device use. Bard received Pro and Pixel 8 Pro received Nano at launch, while Ultra did not reach users until 2024.
Google 已拥有 PaLM、Bard 和多项视觉、语音研究，但模型与产品品牌: Google had PaLM, Bard, and extensive vision and speech research, but its models and product brands were fragmented. GPT-4’s multimodal capabilities increased pressure to unify the frontier roadmap.
Gemini 从训练开始处理多模态数据，而非只在语言模型外接视觉模块。Pro 进: Gemini was trained across modalities rather than attaching a vision module only after language training. Pro entered Bard, Nano shipped on Pixel, and Ultra followed for harder tasks.
它把 Google 的模型、云服务和消费产品拉到一个家族下，也确立“同一模型家族: It unified Google’s models, cloud services, and consumer products under one family and established a product structure spanning on-device deployment through data centers.
Google 的对话模型、多模态研究与产品品牌相互分散。: Google’s conversational models, multimodal research, and product brands were fragmented.
Gemini 成为统一模型品牌，并贯穿端侧、云端和消费者产品。: Gemini became a unified model brand spanning devices, cloud, and consumer products.
Google 搜索、Android 与 Workspace 开始共享同一模型家族: Google Search, Android, and Workspace began drawing from one model family.
Gemini API 和 Vertex AI 成为 Google 生成式 AI: The Gemini API and Vertex AI became Google’s unified generative-AI development entry points.
前沿模型竞争明确进入原生多模态和全产品线分发阶段。: Frontier competition moved decisively into native multimodality and distribution across product lines.
Codex 生成的代码建议进入日常编辑器: Codex-generated suggestions enter the everyday code editor
GitHub 发布 Copilot 技术预览，把 OpenAI Codex 生成: GitHub launched Copilot as a technical preview, placing OpenAI Codex suggestions—from individual lines to whole functions—inside Visual Studio Code. Developers had to accept each suggestion, and GitHub warned that generated code could be wrong or reproduce patterns from training data.
传统补全依赖语言服务器、符号和局部模式，能列出 API 或变量，却很难根据注释与: Traditional completion relied on language servers, symbols, and local patterns. It could list APIs or variables but rarely generated a full implementation from comments and surrounding code.
插件把当前文件和相关上下文发送给模型，生成可接受、拒绝或继续编辑的建议。它可以根: The extension sent the current file and nearby context to the model and returned suggestions that developers could accept, reject, or edit. It generated tests, boilerplate, and common algorithms from names, comments, and code, but still required review.
Copilot 让生成模型进入高频开发动作，而不是停在演示和网页聊天中。它也把生: Copilot moved generative models into a high-frequency development action rather than a demo or web chat. It also made productivity, training-code licensing, similar-code output, and responsibility persistent product issues.
先学习通用语言，再用少量标注适配任务: Learn general language first, then adapt with limited labels
OpenAI 在 BooksCorpus 上预训练 1.17 亿参数、12 层的: OpenAI pretrained a 12-layer, 117-million-parameter Transformer decoder on BooksCorpus, then fine-tuned it on 12 supervised tasks; the paper reported state-of-the-art results on nine.
NLP 模型通常为每个任务单独设计结构，并依赖大量标注数据。词向量能迁移词级知识: NLP models were usually designed for individual tasks and depended on large labeled datasets. Word embeddings transferred lexical knowledge but not full-sentence or long-range context.
模型在 BooksCorpus 上预测下一个词，再用同一主体适配文本蕴含、问答、: The model predicted the next token on BooksCorpus, then reused the same body for entailment, question answering, similarity, and classification by expressing tasks as sequences.
GPT-1 给出了一条可以扩展的简单配方。模型主体不再围绕每项任务重新设计，通用: GPT-1 supplied a simple recipe that could scale. The model body no longer had to be redesigned for every task, making general pretraining a central NLP method.
每个 NLP 任务往往需要专用模型和大量标签。: Each NLP task usually required a dedicated architecture and many labels.
一个预训练 Transformer 可以迁移到多种任务。: One pretrained Transformer could transfer across tasks.
预训练模型加任务微调成为标准开发流程。: Pretrained models followed by task fine-tuning became a standard workflow.
训练通用基础模型再分发能力，开始替代为每个产品单独训练模型的思路。: Training a general base model and distributing its capabilities began replacing separate models for every product task.
规模扩大后，语言模型开始在提示中识别任务: At larger scale, a language model begins inferring tasks from prompts
OpenAI 公布在约 800 万个网页文档上训练的 15 亿参数 GPT-2，: OpenAI presented the 1.5-billion-parameter GPT-2, trained on roughly eight million web documents, and demonstrated basic question answering, summarization, and translation without task-specific fine-tuning. It initially withheld the full model, then released it in November 2019.
GPT-1 已证明预训练后微调有效，但每项任务仍需要标签和额外训练。研究者开始检: GPT-1 showed that pretraining followed by fine-tuning worked, but each task still needed labels and additional training. Researchers began testing whether larger general language models could acquire task behavior directly.
GPT-2 在约 800 万网页组成的 WebText 上训练。OpenAI 先: GPT-2 was trained on WebText, a collection of roughly eight million web pages. OpenAI initially released smaller models, citing misuse concerns, and published the full weights nine months later.
它把“提示本身可以描述任务”推到台前，也第一次让模型权重是否应立即公开成为大规模: It brought the idea that a prompt could specify a task into view and triggered a major public debate over whether powerful model weights should be released immediately.
预训练模型通常需要针对下游任务微调。: Pretrained models usually needed fine-tuning for downstream tasks.
只靠自然语言上下文触发任务能力开始显得可行。: Triggering task behavior through natural-language context began to look viable.
零样本提示开始成为评估通用语言模型的重要方法。: Zero-shot prompting became an important way to evaluate general language models.
分阶段发布、滥用评估和模型开放策略进入前沿模型治理。: Staged release, misuse evaluation, and model-access policy became part of frontier-model governance.
1750 亿参数把少样本提示推向通用接口: 175 billion parameters turn few-shot prompting into a general interface
OpenAI 训练 1750 亿参数 GPT-3，并以零样本、单样本和少样本提示: OpenAI trained the 175-billion-parameter GPT-3 and evaluated it with zero-, one-, and few-shot prompts. It attempted translation, question answering, text generation, and simple code without weight updates, with sharply uneven results across tasks.
GPT-2 已展示零样本迁移，缩放规律也预示损失会随模型、数据和计算量平滑下降。: GPT-2 had shown zero-shot transfer, and scaling laws predicted smoother loss with more models, data, and compute. It remained unclear whether that improvement would produce useful behavior across tasks.
论文比较零样本、单样本和少样本设置。GPT-3 在许多任务上明显改善，但在算术、: The paper compared zero-shot, one-shot, and few-shot settings. GPT-3 improved across many tasks but retained systematic failures in arithmetic, common sense, and bias. OpenAI delivered it through an API rather than releasing weights.
提示开始承担过去由数据集格式和微调代码完成的任务配置工作。API 分发也形成新的: Prompts began performing task configuration previously handled by dataset formats and fine-tuning code. API distribution also established a base-model business model in which one model served many downstream products.
开发者开始围绕通用模型 API 构建写作、搜索和编程应用。: Developers began building writing, search, and coding products around general model APIs.
前沿实验室把更大的训练集群和基础模型 API 纳入长期产品投入。: Frontier labs made larger training clusters and base-model APIs long-term product investments.
图像输入、更稳的复杂任务表现与一次刻意收缩的技术披露: Image input, stronger complex-task performance, and deliberately limited technical disclosure
OpenAI 发布 GPT-4，并报告其在模拟律师资格考试中达到约前 10%，而: OpenAI released GPT-4 and reported performance around the top 10% on a simulated bar exam, versus roughly the bottom 10% for GPT-3.5. Image input was initially limited to partners, and the technical report omitted parameter count, training-data composition, architecture, and training compute.
ChatGPT 已形成大规模使用，但 GPT-3.5 在长推理、事实可靠性和复杂: ChatGPT had reached mass use, but GPT-3.5 often failed on long reasoning, factual reliability, and complex constraints. Multimodal products still chained separate vision and language models.
技术报告公布评测、风险和安全训练结果，却没有披露模型规模、训练计算量、数据集构成: The technical report presented evaluations, risks, and safety work but did not disclose model size, training compute, dataset composition, or architecture. Image input began with limited access, while the text API became the main production entry.
GPT-4 把前沿模型从通用文本生成推向专业工作和视觉理解，同时确立更封闭的技术: GPT-4 moved frontier models from general text generation toward professional work and visual understanding while establishing a more closed disclosure pattern. Better capability did not remove hallucinations, prompt injection, or opaque failures.
用户不必在聊天模型与推理模型之间反复选择，系统可以按任务分配计算并决定是否调用工: Users no longer had to switch repeatedly between chat and reasoning models. The system could allocate compute and decide when to use tools, shifting product focus from one response to the cost and reliability of a complete task.
用户无需写代码即可组合指令、知识与工具: Users combine instructions, knowledge, and tools without writing code
OpenAI 在首届 DevDay 发布 GPTs，让 ChatGPT Plus: At its first DevDay, OpenAI introduced GPTs for ChatGPT Plus and Enterprise users, combining instructions, uploaded files, built-in tools, and custom Actions without retraining a model. The GPT Store, initially planned for November, opened in January 2024.
创建模型应用通常需要 API、前端、检索和托管。大量用户只需要一个围绕特定资料和: Building a model application usually required APIs, a frontend, retrieval, and hosting. Many users only needed a ChatGPT tailored to particular documents and workflows rather than a full software project.
GPT Builder 把名称、指令、文件、能力和 Actions 封装成可分享: GPT Builder packaged a name, instructions, files, capabilities, and Actions into a shareable object. OpenAI later launched the GPT Store to distribute public GPTs.
它把提示、知识库和工具配置产品化，验证“轻量 Agent 配置”需求，也显示没有: It productized prompts, retrieval, and tool configuration, validating demand for lightweight agent setup while showing how low-friction creation produces many similar artifacts without durable use cases or distribution.
定制 ChatGPT 主要依赖每次重复提示或开发 API 应用。: Customizing ChatGPT required repeated prompts or a separately developed API app.
指令、文件和工具可以保存、分享并通过目录分发。: Instructions, files, and tools could be saved, shared, and distributed through a catalog.
非开发者可以把资料和规则封装成可重复使用的专用助手。: Non-developers could package documents and rules into reusable specialized assistants.
AI 产品增加了介于单次聊天和完整应用之间的配置层。: AI products gained a configuration layer between a one-off chat and a full application.
大规模检索、排序与自然语言处理完成公开问答挑战: Retrieval, ranking, and language processing solve a public question-answering challenge
IBM Watson 在三场《Jeopardy!》比赛中击败两位冠军选手，展示机: IBM Watson defeated two champion contestants over three Jeopardy! matches, demonstrating clue interpretation, evidence retrieval, and confidence-ranked answers.
开放领域问答需要解析不完整线索、从大量资料寻找候选答案，并判断何时值得作答。单一: Open-domain question answering requires parsing incomplete clues, retrieving candidates from large collections, and deciding when confidence is high enough to answer. No single rule or model covered the full pipeline.
Watson 的 DeepQA 系统并行生成候选答案，调用多种搜索和分析组件，再: Watson’s DeepQA system generated candidates in parallel, ran many search and analysis components, and used machine learning to combine evidence. The competition system ran offline without internet access.
它是深度学习全面主导前最后一批大型混合式 AI 系统代表，也让企业看到自然语言问: It was a prominent large hybrid AI system just before deep learning became dominant and showed enterprises that language question answering could be decomposed into measurable retrieval, evidence, and ranking stages.
自动问答多以实验室评测或受限领域系统出现。: Automated question answering appeared mainly in lab benchmarks or restricted domains.
大规模自然语言问答成为公众可理解的 AI 产品能力。: Large-scale language question answering became a publicly understandable AI capability.
问答系统成为企业 AI 的重要入口，影响了后来搜索增强和知识库产品的设计。: Question answering became a major enterprise AI interface and influenced later retrieval-augmented and knowledge-base products.
公开比赛带动 IBM 将 Watson 品牌扩展到医疗和企业分析，但后续落地也暴: The public win led IBM to expand Watson into healthcare and enterprise analytics, where deployment exposed the difficulty of moving from a controlled task to real settings.
1400 万张标注图像把数据规模变成研究基础设施: Fourteen million labeled images turn data scale into research infrastructure
李飞飞团队发布 ImageNet，按 WordNet 名词层级组织超过 1400: Fei-Fei Li’s team released ImageNet, organizing more than fourteen million human-labeled images through the WordNet noun hierarchy. The annual ILSVRC challenge began in 2010 with shared data and evaluation.
团队从网络收集候选图片，再通过众包完成类别核验。竞赛常用子集包含约 120 万张: The team collected candidate images from the web and used crowdsourcing to verify labels. The competition subset contained roughly 1.2 million training images across 1,000 classes, allowing algorithms to be compared on the same data, metrics, and deadline.
ImageNet 说明训练数据本身可以是公共研究基础设施。它为 AlexNet: ImageNet showed that training data itself could be public research infrastructure. It gave AlexNet enough material and a clear performance gap, while leaving lasting questions about label bias, copyright, and data governance.
InstructGPT 用人类反馈对齐指令: InstructGPT aligns models with human instructions
更小的模型因回答方式更符合偏好而胜过 GPT-3: A smaller model is preferred over GPT-3 because it follows instructions better
OpenAI 公开 InstructGPT 的三阶段训练方法：监督示范微调、人工: OpenAI described InstructGPT's three-stage procedure: supervised demonstrations, a reward model trained on preference rankings, and PPO reinforcement learning. Labelers preferred the 1.3B InstructGPT to the roughly 100-times-larger 175B GPT-3 in pairwise comparisons, within the study's prompts and labeling rules.
纯粹预测下一个词的模型能续写文本，却不天然理解用户是在提问、要求改写还是拒绝危险: A next-token predictor could continue text but did not inherently know whether a user wanted an answer, a rewrite, or refusal of harmful content. More parameters did not automatically align interaction goals.
标注员先写出理想回答用于监督微调，再对多个模型回答排序，训练奖励模型，最后通过: Labelers first wrote demonstrations for supervised fine-tuning, then ranked model outputs to train a reward model, and PPO optimized the final policy. Human evaluators preferred the 1.3B model to the original 175B GPT-3.
它把“模型会什么”和“模型是否按人类意图回答”分成两个训练问题。这个流程直接支撑: It separated what a model knows from whether it responds according to human intent. The process directly enabled ChatGPT and made preference data, alignment, and behavior policy central product concerns.
大模型主要按预训练语料的统计规律续写文本。: Large models mainly continued text according to patterns in pretraining data.
后训练明确塑造模型遵循指令、拒绝请求和表达不确定性的方式。: Post-training deliberately shaped instruction following, refusals, and expressions of uncertainty.
模型回答更直接、更少延续有害或无关提示，聊天式使用开始可行。: Answers became more direct and less likely to continue harmful or irrelevant prompts, making conversational use practical.
RLHF 成为前沿语言模型后训练的标准组成部分。: RLHF became a standard component of frontier language-model post-training.
数据标注从类别标签扩展到示范、比较和复杂行为偏好。: Data labeling expanded from class labels to demonstrations, comparisons, and complex behavioral preferences.
高性能权重离开 API，开放模型社区迅速成形: Capable weights move beyond APIs and an open-model community forms
Meta 发布 7B、13B、33B 和 65B 参数的 LLaMA 论文，并向: Meta published LLaMA at 7B, 13B, 33B, and 65B parameters and offered noncommercial weights to approved researchers; the 65B model was trained on 1.4 trillion tokens. After the weights leaked, the community rapidly built quantization, fine-tuning, and local-inference tools.
GPT-3.5 与 PaLM 等高能力模型主要通过封闭 API 提供。研究者难以: Capable models such as GPT-3.5 and PaLM were mainly available through closed APIs. Researchers could not inspect weights, modify training, or run them within their own hardware and data boundaries.
LLaMA 强调用更多 token 训练相对较小模型，在多项基准上以较少参数达到: LLaMA emphasized training smaller models on more tokens and achieved competitive benchmarks with fewer parameters. The first release was not under an open-source software license; Llama 2 later allowed broader commercial use while retaining restrictions.
可获得权重让社区能量化、微调和研究模型内部，形成独立于托管 API 的部署路线。: Available weights let the community quantize, fine-tune, and study models internally, creating a deployment path independent of hosted APIs. It also forced clearer distinctions among open weights, open code, and open-source licensing.
早期 AI 用启发式搜索处理符号推理: An early AI system applies heuristic search to symbolic reasoning
Allen Newell、Herbert Simon 与 Cliff Shaw: Allen Newell, Herbert Simon, and Cliff Shaw built Logic Theorist, which used heuristic search to prove 38 of 52 propositions in chapter two of *Principia Mathematica*. One proof was shorter than the published version.
早期计算机主要被看作高速算术设备。要让机器处理推理，研究者必须把符号、规则和求解: Early computers were viewed mainly as fast arithmetic machines. Symbolic reasoning required researchers to represent symbols, rules, and problem-solving steps in executable form.
Logic Theorist 把证明过程视为状态空间搜索，用启发式规则减少需要尝: Logic Theorist treated proof as a search through states and used heuristics to reduce the paths explored. It proved 38 of 52 selected propositions, including one proof shorter than the published version.
它给出了“通用问题求解器”的早期样板，也确立了符号表示、搜索和启发式规则这条持续: It became an early model of general problem solving and established symbolic representation, search, and heuristics as a major AI research program.
计算机程序的代表用途是数值计算。: Numerical calculation was the representative use of computer programs.
符号推理和启发式搜索成为正式研究对象。: Symbolic reasoning and heuristic search became formal research subjects.
证明程序可以处理此前被认为需要人类推理的任务，推动符号 AI 成为早期主流。: It showed that programs could perform tasks associated with human reasoning and helped make symbolic AI the early mainstream.
用客户端—服务器协议复用工具、资源与提示: A client-server protocol makes tools, resources, and prompts reusable
Anthropic 发布 Model Context Protocol，定义 A: Anthropic released the Model Context Protocol, a client-server interface for AI applications to discover and use external tools, resources, and prompt templates.
函数调用解决了模型如何输出工具参数，却没有规定编辑器、桌面助手和数据源怎样发现、: Function calling defined how models emitted tool arguments but not how editors, desktop assistants, and data sources discovered, connected, or authorized each other. Every host still maintained its own plugin format.
MCP 使用 JSON-RPC，区分 Host、Client 与 Server。: MCP used JSON-RPC and separated hosts, clients, and servers. Servers could expose tools, read-only resources, and prompts; clients handled connections and capability negotiation; hosts retained user permission and model interaction control.
同一个集成可以被多个兼容应用复用，工具生态不必围绕单一模型供应商重写。协议仍不能: One integration could be reused by multiple compatible applications rather than rewritten for each model provider. The protocol did not automatically solve trust, permissions, malicious servers, or prompt injection; those responsibilities remained with the host and user boundary.
《Perceptrons》划出单层网络的边界: Perceptrons maps the limits of single-layer networks
对能力边界的数学分析，后来被误读为对神经网络的终审: A mathematical analysis later misread as a verdict on all neural networks
Minsky 与 Papert 系统分析感知机，证明单层线性模型无法解决 XOR: Marvin Minsky and Seymour Papert analyzed perceptrons, proving that single-layer linear models could not solve XOR and examining their computational limits.
1950 年代末的感知机被公开宣传为可能具备学习、识别甚至语言能力的通用机器，但: The perceptron had been promoted publicly as a general learning machine that might support recognition and language, while its theoretical limits remained unclear.
书中的结论针对特定类型的单层感知机。多层网络理论上可以跨过部分限制，但当时缺少有: The book’s results concerned particular single-layer perceptrons. Multilayer networks could in principle overcome some limits, but effective training methods and sufficient computing were not yet available.
它纠正了早期宣传，也影响了研究资金和注意力的流向。后来把整段神经网络低潮归因于一: It corrected early hype and influenced the flow of research attention and funding. Blaming the entire neural-network downturn on one book is too simple, but the episode shows how a precise result can become a broader narrative.
感知机的公共叙事远超已有实验和理论证据。: Public claims about perceptrons ran far ahead of experimental and theoretical evidence.
单层模型的限制被明确，神经网络进入较长的低关注期。: The limits of single-layer models were clear, and neural networks entered a long period of reduced attention.
神经网络研究的声势下降，符号 AI 在接下来的阶段占据更多资源。: Neural-network research lost momentum while symbolic AI received more attention and resources.
Mistral 7B 以小模型进入开放生态: Mistral 7B enters the open ecosystem with a small model
轻量架构和宽松许可证明“小而强”仍有空间: Efficient architecture and a permissive license show the value of small capable models
Mistral AI 以 Apache 2.0 许可证发布 Mistral 7B: Mistral AI released Mistral 7B weights under Apache 2.0. The model used grouped-query attention and a 4,096-token sliding window; the company reported outperforming Llama 2 13B on several benchmarks, a vendor-run comparison rather than an independent finding.
Llama 2 已扩大开放权重模型生态，但本地部署仍受显存、吞吐和商业许可约束。: Llama 2 had expanded the open-weight ecosystem, but local deployment remained constrained by memory, throughput, and licensing. The market needed smaller capable models under permissive terms.
7B 模型在多项公开基准上超过更大的 Llama 2 13B，并允许商业使用。随: The 7B model outperformed the larger Llama 2 13B on several public benchmarks and allowed commercial use. Mixtral later used sparse mixture-of-experts to increase effective capacity.
Mistral 证明开放模型竞争不只追求参数规模，也可以围绕架构效率、部署成本和: Mistral showed that open-model competition could focus on architectural efficiency, deployment cost, and licensing rather than parameter count alone, while establishing an independent European frontier lab.
开放模型的主叙事主要由更大的 Llama 家族推动。: The open-model story was driven mainly by larger Llama releases.
小模型效率、宽松许可和 MoE 成为开放生态的核心竞争点。: Small-model efficiency, permissive licensing, and MoE became central competitive dimensions.
单张高端消费级 GPU 上运行高质量模型变得更实用。: Running a capable model on one high-end consumer GPU became more practical.
开放模型市场形成 Meta 之外的重要供应者和商业路线。: The open-model market gained an important supplier and commercial path beyond Meta.
OpenAI Five 击败 Dota 2 世界冠军: OpenAI Five defeats the Dota 2 world champions
大规模自我博弈进入实时多人复杂环境: Large-scale self-play reaches a complex real-time multiplayer environment
OpenAI Five 在一场三局两胜的公开赛中连胜两局，击败 2018 年 D: OpenAI Five won the first two games of a best-of-three exhibition against OG, the 2018 Dota 2 world champion. The match used a 17-hero pool and other restrictions, with five agents each controlling one character in real time.
围棋等棋类回合明确、动作离散。Dota 2 同时包含实时控制、部分可观测、长时间: Board games have clear turns and discrete actions. Dota 2 adds real-time control, partial observability, long horizons, huge action spaces, and team coordination.
系统使用大规模分布式强化学习和自我博弈，每天积累相当于约 180 年的对局经验。: The system used distributed reinforcement learning and self-play, accumulating roughly 180 years of experience each day. The match setup still restricted heroes, items, and some game rules.
它展示强化学习可以依靠算力和自动生成经验处理比棋盘更连续、更嘈杂的环境，同时也暴: It showed that reinforcement learning could use compute and generated experience in an environment far messier than a board game, while exposing the limits of sample cost and environment-specific engineering.
强化学习的公众突破主要集中在棋类和单智能体游戏。: Public reinforcement-learning breakthroughs centered on board games and single-agent play.
多智能体协作与实时长程任务进入前沿演示范围。: Multi-agent coordination and real-time long-horizon tasks entered frontier demonstrations.
大规模并行模拟、自我博弈和策略训练成为复杂控制任务的重要工程范式。: Large parallel simulation, self-play, and policy training became an important engineering pattern for complex control.
算力不只用于训练静态数据模型，也可用于自动产生交互经验。: Compute could be used not only to train on static datasets but also to generate interactive experience automatically.
对话助手首次以统一目录调用搜索、计算和交易工具: A conversational assistant gains a shared catalog for search, computation, and transactions
OpenAI 向候补名单用户开放 ChatGPT 插件测试。第三方以域名下的清单: OpenAI opened ChatGPT plugins to users from a waitlist. Third parties described endpoints through a domain-hosted manifest and an OpenAPI specification for the model to select, while OpenAI supplied the initial browsing and code-interpreter plugins.
ChatGPT 的知识受训练截止日期限制，也不能可靠执行计算或访问用户授权的外部: ChatGPT was limited by a knowledge cutoff and could not reliably calculate or access user-authorized systems. Developers built custom integrations without a shared discovery or permission interface.
首批插件包括浏览器、代码解释器和 Expedia、Wolfram 等第三方服务。: Initial plugins included browsing, a code interpreter, and services such as Expedia and Wolfram. The model selected and called tools that users enabled inside ChatGPT.
