插件目录没有成为最终标准，但它首次让大规模用户体验“模型选择工具完成任务”，并暴: The plugin catalog did not become the final standard, but it gave a mass audience its first experience of a model selecting tools to finish tasks and exposed permission, prompt-injection, review, and distribution problems.
ChatGPT 主要在封闭对话中生成文本。: ChatGPT mainly generated text inside a closed conversation.
对话界面开始成为外部工具和服务的调度入口。: The chat interface became an orchestration point for external tools and services.
ChatGPT 能访问实时网页、运行代码并调用第三方服务。: ChatGPT could access live web data, run code, and use third-party services.
工具描述、授权和结果回传成为构建模型应用的共同问题。: Tool descriptions, authorization, and result handling became shared model-application concerns.
线性分类器可以从样本中自动更新权重: A linear classifier learns its weights from examples
Frank Rosenblatt 提出感知机学习规则，并在 Cornell Ae: Frank Rosenblatt introduced the perceptron learning rule and built the Mark I hardware at Cornell Aeronautical Laboratory to learn binary image classifications from examples.
输入经过可调权重求和，再由阈值函数给出类别。预测错误时，学习规则按样本方向修改权: Inputs were multiplied by adjustable weights and passed through a threshold. On an error, the learning rule updated weights toward the example; convergence could be proved for linearly separable data. It could not represent nonlinear boundaries such as XOR.
感知机把“学习”落实为根据误差更新参数的算法，并提供了可运行硬件。它的严格边界同: The perceptron made learning an algorithm that updated parameters from error and implemented it in working hardware. Its strict limits mattered too; multilayer networks and backpropagation later developed to move beyond them.
监督样本可以直接驱动参数更新，而不必手写全部分类规则。: Supervised examples could update parameters directly instead of requiring every classification rule to be written.
神经网络获得第一轮集中研究和公共资金支持。: Neural networks received their first concentrated wave of research and public funding.
中文与多语言开放模型形成持续迭代家族: A Chinese and multilingual open model becomes a continuously updated family
阿里云发布 Qwen-7B 与 Qwen-7B-Chat 的代码和权重；基础模型: Alibaba Cloud released code and weights for Qwen-7B and Qwen-7B-Chat; the base model was pretrained on more than 2.2 trillion tokens spanning Chinese, English, code, and multilingual text. Its license allowed research and commercial use below a 100-million-monthly-user threshold, with separate permission required above it.
2023 年开放权重模型快速增长，但高质量中文数据、中文指令跟随和本地企业部署仍: Open-weight models expanded rapidly in 2023, but high-quality Chinese data, Chinese instruction following, and local enterprise deployment still lacked durable options.
首批 7B 模型在 ModelScope 和 Hugging Face 发布，随: The initial 7B models shipped on ModelScope and Hugging Face, then expanded across parameter sizes and into vision, audio, coding, and math variants with evolving licenses.
Qwen 把中文开放模型从单次发布推进成长期维护的完整家族，并通过云平台、模型社: Qwen moved Chinese open models from one-off releases to a maintained family and built continuous distribution through cloud services, model hubs, and application ecosystems.
中文大模型大多通过封闭产品和 API 提供。: Chinese large models were delivered mainly through closed products and APIs.
一个持续更新的中文开放模型家族进入全球开发者社区。: A continuously updated Chinese open-model family entered the global developer community.
中文应用获得可以本地部署、微调和继续训练的基础模型选择。: Chinese-language applications gained base models that could be deployed locally, fine-tuned, and further trained.
中国模型厂商的竞争从 API 服务扩展到开放权重和开发者生态。: Competition among Chinese model providers expanded from APIs into open weights and developer ecosystems.
ResNet 让超深网络可训练: ResNet makes very deep networks trainable
残差连接为信息和梯度提供短路径: Residual connections give information and gradients a shorter path
微软研究者提出残差网络，用跳跃连接训练 152 层模型，并赢得 2015 年 I: Microsoft researchers introduced residual networks, training a 152-layer model with skip connections and winning the 2015 ImageNet classification task.
增加网络深度理论上能提高表达能力，实际训练却出现退化问题。更深的普通网络不仅难优: More depth should increase representational power, but plain deep networks suffered degradation. They were harder to optimize and could have higher training error than shallower versions.
残差块不直接学习完整映射，而是学习相对输入的残差，并把输入通过恒等连接送到更深层: A residual block learned a change relative to its input rather than a complete mapping, while an identity connection carried the input forward. This created a more direct optimization path.
残差连接成为视觉网络和后续多种深层架构的基础部件。它也提供了一个可迁移的工程思想: Residual connections became a basic component of vision networks and many later deep architectures. They also established a transferable engineering idea by preserving stable information paths through deep systems.
网络越深越难训练，深度本身会造成性能退化。: Deeper networks were harder to optimize and could degrade in performance.
跳跃连接成为扩展深度的标准方法。: Skip connections became the standard method for scaling depth.
数百层网络可以稳定训练，视觉骨干网络迅速转向残差结构。: Networks hundreds of layers deep became trainable, and vision backbones rapidly adopted residual structure.
更强的图像识别模型进入检测、分割和工业视觉系统。: Stronger image recognition moved into detection, segmentation, and industrial vision systems.
神经语言模型缩放规律被量化: Neural language-model scaling laws are quantified
性能与参数、数据和计算量呈可预测幂律关系: Performance follows predictable power laws in parameters, data, and compute
OpenAI 研究者在跨越七个数量级的计算规模上拟合经验幂律，测量语言模型交叉熵: OpenAI researchers fit empirical power laws across more than seven orders of magnitude of compute, measuring how language-model cross-entropy loss varied with parameters, data, and training compute and deriving a compute-allocation rule for the tested regime.
更大的模型往往更好，但团队缺少可靠方法估计增加数据、参数或训练时间的收益，也难判: Larger models often performed better, but teams lacked a reliable way to estimate gains from more data, parameters, or training time and to judge whether a run was close to compute-optimal.
论文发现跨多个数量级，交叉熵损失与三种规模变量呈平滑幂律关系，其他因素不构成瓶颈: Across several orders of magnitude, the paper found smooth power-law relationships between cross-entropy loss and the three scale variables, allowing extrapolation when other factors were not bottlenecks.
缩放从经验判断变成可用于预算和路线选择的工程工具，直接支持了更大训练集群和基础模: Scaling moved from intuition to an engineering tool for budgets and roadmaps, supporting investment in larger training clusters and foundation models. Later work such as Chinchilla revised the optimal balance of data and parameters.
扩大模型主要依赖经验和零散观察。: Scaling models relied mainly on intuition and isolated observations.
规模收益可以被拟合、预测并写进训练计划。: Returns to scale could be fitted, predicted, and incorporated into training plans.
训练前可以用小规模实验估计大模型的损失和资源需求。: Small runs could be used to estimate the loss and resource needs of much larger models.
前沿模型竞争越来越依赖持续扩大的算力、数据和资本投入。: Frontier-model competition increasingly depended on sustained growth in compute, data, and capital.
编码器与解码器把翻译变成端到端学习问题: An encoder and decoder turn translation into an end-to-end learning problem
Google 研究者提出用两个多层 LSTM 将输入序列编码成向量，再逐步生成输: Google researchers used two multilayer LSTMs to encode an input sequence into a vector and generate an output sequence, producing competitive machine-translation results.
神经网络已经能处理固定标签任务，但翻译的输入和输出长度都不固定，传统系统还依赖分: Neural networks handled fixed-label tasks, but translation has variable-length inputs and outputs. Traditional systems still relied on complex pipelines of tokenization, phrase tables, alignment, and language models.
编码器读取源句并形成内部表示，解码器根据表示逐词生成目标句。论文还发现反转源句顺: The encoder read the source sentence into an internal representation, and the decoder generated the target one token at a time. Reversing source-word order shortened dependency paths and improved optimization.
Seq2Seq 把翻译、摘要和对话等任务放进同一个“输入序列到输出序列”框架。随: Seq2Seq placed translation, summarization, and dialogue in one input-to-output framework. Attention was added soon after, creating a direct path toward the Transformer.
翻译系统依赖多个独立训练和调参的组件。: Translation depended on multiple separately trained and tuned components.
一个神经网络可以直接学习从源序列到目标序列的映射。: A neural network could learn the mapping from source sequence to target sequence directly.
自然语言任务开始从人工拼接的模块转向端到端训练的通用结构。: Language systems began moving from hand-assembled modules to general end-to-end trainable structures.
神经机器翻译逐步替代统计机器翻译，显著简化产品技术栈。: Neural machine translation gradually replaced statistical pipelines and simplified production stacks.
视频生成被表述为对时空世界的统一建模: Video generation is framed as unified modeling of a spatiotemporal world
OpenAI 公布 Sora 研究预览，可根据文字生成最长一分钟、保持较高视觉质: OpenAI previewed Sora, generating videos up to one minute from text while maintaining relatively high visual quality and scene continuity.
早期文生视频通常只有数秒，容易出现物体变形、身份漂移和运动不连续。图像扩散模型还: Early text-to-video systems produced only seconds of footage and often suffered object deformation, identity drift, and broken motion. Image diffusion lacked a stable way to represent longer time and complex shots.
Sora 把压缩视频切成时空 patch，用类似语言模型 token 的方式交给: Sora compressed video into spacetime patches and processed them with a diffusion transformer in a way analogous to language-model tokens. It could also extend, fill, or connect existing videos.
它显示扩散 Transformer 能跨图像和视频扩展，也让物理一致性、训练数据: It showed diffusion transformers scaling across image and video and made physical consistency, training-data rights, impersonation, and film workflows urgent issues.
文生视频多是短片段和明显不稳定的研究演示。: Text-to-video consisted mainly of short, visibly unstable research clips.
一分钟级生成和复杂镜头控制成为前沿模型目标。: Minute-scale generation and complex shot control became frontier targets.
文字和静态素材开始可以直接生成较长的动态镜头。: Text and still assets could produce substantially longer moving shots.
视频生成模型进入影视、广告和创意软件的产品竞争。: Video generation entered competition across film, advertising, and creative software.
Stable Diffusion 开放文生图权重: Stable Diffusion releases open text-to-image weights
消费级 GPU 也能运行并改造生成模型: A generative image model can run and be modified on consumer GPUs
Stability AI 与 CompVis 发布 Stable Diffusi: Stability AI and CompVis released Stable Diffusion 1.4's code and roughly 4GB of weights. By denoising in a compressed latent space, it could generate 512×512 images on consumer GPUs and enabled local fine-tuning and third-party interfaces.
DALL·E 2 和 Imagen 已展示强大的文本生成图像能力，但主要通过封闭: DALL·E 2 and Imagen had demonstrated strong text-to-image generation, but access was mainly through closed services or research demos. Developers could not inspect weights or freely modify inference.
模型在压缩后的潜空间运行扩散过程，显著降低显存和计算需求。发布后社区迅速制作 W: The model ran diffusion in a compressed latent space, reducing memory and compute requirements. The community quickly built web interfaces, ControlNet, LoRA, model merging, and many domain fine-tunes.
它把生成图像从少数实验室控制的能力变成可下载的软件生态。开放同时带来创作自由、版: It turned image generation from a capability controlled by a few labs into a downloadable software ecosystem, bringing creative freedom alongside copyright, non-consensual imagery, and safety disputes.
高质量文生图主要由封闭实验室和托管产品提供。: High-quality text-to-image generation was mainly available through closed labs and hosted products.
生成模型可以在本地运行、分叉并被社区持续重组。: Generative models could run locally, be forked, and be continuously recombined by a community.
普通用户可以在本地反复生成和编辑图像，不必把提示与素材上传到单一服务。: People could generate and edit images locally without sending prompts and assets to one service.
插件、微调、工作流和模型社区围绕开放权重快速形成。: Plugins, fine-tunes, workflows, and model communities formed rapidly around downloadable weights.
商业文生图服务必须面对开放生态的低成本竞争。: Commercial text-to-image services faced low-cost competition from an open ecosystem.
SWE-bench 用真实 GitHub Issue 评测编程 Agent: SWE-bench evaluates coding agents on real GitHub issues
从函数生成转向跨文件理解、修改与测试: Evaluation moves from function generation to repository-scale repair and testing
普林斯顿团队发布 SWE-bench，把真实 Python 仓库中的 2,294: Princeton researchers introduced SWE-bench, turning 2,294 resolved issues from real Python repositories into executable software-engineering tasks.
HumanEval 等基准主要测试从说明生成独立函数，无法覆盖真实开发中的代码库: Benchmarks such as HumanEval focused on generating isolated functions and did not cover repository navigation, dependency reasoning, cross-file edits, or regression testing.
每个任务提供仓库快照和 Issue 描述，模型需要生成补丁，再由原项目测试验证。: Each task provided a repository snapshot and issue description. A model had to generate a patch that passed the project’s tests. Initial scores were low, showing that code generation did not equal software-engineering ability.
SWE-bench 给 Coding Agent 提供了共同目标，也改变产品宣传: SWE-bench supplied a shared target for coding agents and changed product claims. Fixing real issues, passing tests, and handling long context became more meaningful than generating attractive snippets.
编程模型主要按独立题目和单函数正确率排名。: Coding models were ranked mainly on isolated problems and function-level correctness.
评测开始要求模型在真实仓库中完成可测试的修改。: Evaluation required testable changes inside real repositories.
Agent 框架开始围绕检索、编辑、执行测试和迭代修复设计完整闭环。: Agent frameworks were designed around a full loop of retrieval, editing, testing, and iterative repair.
SWE-bench Verified 等版本成为前沿模型和 AI Coding: Variants such as SWE-bench Verified became common metrics for frontier models and coding products.
训练、部署与硬件加速进入同一套通用框架: Training, deployment, and hardware acceleration enter one general framework
Google 以 Apache 2.0 许可证发布 TensorFlow，把内部: Google released TensorFlow under the Apache 2.0 license, opening its second-generation internal machine-learning system to researchers and developers.
深度学习实验需要自动求导、GPU 计算、数据流水线和分布式训练。各团队重复搭建基: Deep-learning work required automatic differentiation, GPU execution, data pipelines, and distributed training. Teams repeatedly rebuilt infrastructure, and research code was hard to move into production.
TensorFlow 用数据流图表示计算，支持 CPU、GPU 和服务器部署。G: TensorFlow represented computation as dataflow graphs and supported CPUs, GPUs, and server deployment. Google released documentation and examples, built a community, and later paired it with TPUs and cloud services.
框架把模型开发从“自己实现训练系统”变成组合算子和调用工具链，显著扩大了能参与深: The framework moved model development from building a training system to composing operations and using a shared toolchain, expanding participation and shortening the path from papers to products.
训练系统与模型代码高度绑定，复现和部署成本高。: Training systems were tightly coupled to model code, making reproduction and deployment expensive.
通用框架承接底层计算，模型迭代速度显著提高。: General frameworks handled lower-level computation and accelerated model iteration.
自动求导、模型保存和跨硬件执行成为框架提供的默认能力。: Automatic differentiation, model serialization, and execution across hardware became framework defaults.
开源框架成为云服务、芯片和开发者生态竞争的入口。: Open-source frameworks became entry points for competition across cloud services, chips, and developer ecosystems.
Claude Tool Use 正式可用: Claude tool use becomes generally available
并行工具、图像输入和结构化调用进入 Claude API: Parallel tools, image input, and structured calls enter the Claude API
Anthropic 宣布 Claude Tool Use 正式可用。开发者用 J: Anthropic made Claude Tool Use generally available. Developers described client-side tools with JSON Schema, and Claude returned a `tool_use` content block with structured arguments; execution, authorization, and result submission remained the client's responsibility.
函数调用已经成为大模型接入实时数据和业务系统的基本模式，但各家 API 的并行调: Function calling had become the basic way to connect models with live data and business systems, while parallel calls, error handling, and prompting conventions were still evolving across providers.
Claude 可以根据工具描述选择一个或多个工具，并把参数交给应用执行。Anth: Claude could select one or more tools from their descriptions and return arguments for the application to execute. Anthropic also demonstrated customer-service and image-related tool workflows.
工具调用从单家 API 特性变成前沿模型的共同能力，Agent 框架可以在不同模: Tool calling became a shared frontier-model capability rather than one provider’s feature, allowing agent frameworks to move across models and creating demand for later MCP standardization.
Claude 主要通过文本上下文接收信息并生成回答。: Claude mainly consumed text context and generated responses.
Claude 可以在应用控制下选择结构化工具并参与执行循环。: Claude could select structured tools inside an application-controlled execution loop.
Claude 应用可以使用数据库、API 和私有操作，不必把所有信息塞进提示。: Claude applications could use databases, APIs, and private operations without placing everything in prompts.
工具描述与调用协议开始成为模型平台竞争和兼容性的关键层。: Tool descriptions and invocation protocols became a critical layer for model-platform competition and compatibility.
自注意力取代循环结构，序列训练可以大规模并行: Self-attention replaces recurrence and makes sequence training highly parallel
Google 研究者在机器翻译论文中提出 Transformer，用自注意力、前: Google researchers introduced the Transformer for machine translation, building an encoder-decoder from self-attention, feed-forward layers, and positional encoding without recurrence or convolution.
RNN 和 LSTM 必须按时间顺序处理 token，长序列难以并行训练，信息也: RNNs and LSTMs processed tokens sequentially, limiting parallel training and forcing information through long paths. Attention had usually been an auxiliary module on top of recurrent networks.
多头自注意力让每个位置直接读取序列中的其他位置，位置编码补回顺序信息。论文在 W: Multi-head self-attention let every position read other positions directly, while positional encoding restored order information. The model achieved state-of-the-art WMT translation results with lower training cost.
架构能在并行硬件上有效扩展，并能拆成仅编码器或仅解码器，随后分别形成 BERT: The architecture scaled efficiently on parallel hardware and could be split into encoder-only or decoder-only forms, leading to families such as BERT and GPT. Quadratic attention cost also created the long-context problem and drove sparse and linear alternatives.
序列模型可以高效并行训练，并复用统一的注意力模块。: Sequence models could train efficiently in parallel and reuse a shared attention module.
编码器、解码器和多模态变体成为基础模型常用架构。: Encoder, decoder, and multimodal variants became common base-model architectures.
把“机器能否思考”改写成可讨论的行为问题: Reframing machine intelligence as an observable behavior
图灵在《计算机器与智能》中提出“模仿游戏”：询问者只通过文字与人和机器交谈，再判: In “Computing Machinery and Intelligence,” Alan Turing proposed an imitation game in which an interrogator used text alone to distinguish a person from a machine. He also discussed training a “child machine”; the game was not presented as a test for consciousness.
电子计算机刚出现不久，“机器能否思考”缺少共同的讨论方法。直接定义思考，很快会陷: Electronic computers were still new, and there was no shared way to discuss whether a machine could think. Defining thought directly led quickly into linguistic and philosophical disputes.
测试让一名提问者仅通过文字与人和机器交谈，再判断哪一方是机器。图灵同时讨论了学习: A judge would converse by text with a human and a machine, then decide which was which. Turing also discussed learning machines, common objections, and the possibility of training systems instead of writing every rule by hand.
它没有解决智能的定义，却给 AI 留下了一个可操作的问题，也长期影响了聊天机器人: The paper did not define intelligence, but it supplied an operational question that shaped chatbots, human evaluation, and public discussion of machine intelligence for decades.
机器智能主要是哲学猜想和早期计算理论中的问题。: Machine intelligence was largely a philosophical question tied to early theories of computation.
研究者有了一个可以通过交互行为讨论和批评的测试框架。: Researchers had an interactive behavioral framework that could be tested and criticized.
“图灵测试”成为机器智能最广为人知的公共参照，也持续引发对评测是否只奖励模仿人类: The Turing test became the best-known public reference for machine intelligence while prompting lasting debate over whether evaluation should reward imitation of humans.
用简单预测任务高效学习大规模词向量: Simple prediction objectives learn useful word vectors at scale
Google 团队发布 Word2Vec 的 CBOW 与 Skip-gram: Google researchers introduced the CBOW and Skip-gram Word2Vec methods, using local-context prediction to learn dense word vectors efficiently from billions of words.
One-hot 表示把每个词看成互不相关的独立符号，早期神经语言模型能学习嵌入，: One-hot representations treated every word as unrelated, while early neural language models learned embeddings too slowly for very large vocabularies and corpora.
CBOW 根据周围词预测中心词，Skip-gram 反过来根据中心词预测上下文。: CBOW predicted a center word from context, while Skip-gram predicted context from the center. Negative sampling and hierarchical softmax reduced computation. The vectors showed interpretable similarities and analogies without becoming reliable symbolic arithmetic.
词向量成为搜索、分类和神经网络输入的通用部件，也让研究者清楚看到训练语料中的社会: Word vectors became a common component for search, classification, and neural-network input and made it clear that social bias in training text entered the representation itself. Contextual models later addressed words with multiple meanings.
